prompts.display_text: FORMAT: 15s / MULTI-CUT / 6 BEATS / HIGH-VIRAL COMEDIC PAYOFF SUBJECTS: A small round-faced figure with huge eyes, copper-red pigtails, a yellow polka-dot dress, and exaggerated cartoon proportions. A tall ice cream vendor with a curled mustache, crimson vest, tilted cap, and a long brass paddle carrying elastic white ice cream. Stylized 3D animation with rounded shapes and squash-and-stretch. ENVIRONMENT: A sunlit stone courtyard in an old hillside town with flower-draped archways, a mosaic fountain, ceramic bowls, and a brass ice cream cart with copper bells. Late afternoon light creates warm highlights on cobblestone. MOOD: Fast slapstick mischief with instant hooks, fake wins, and a crowd-pleasing payoff. COLOR LOGIC: Hyperreal Pop Look TIMELINE: 0:00-0:02: The Scroll Stop. Extreme close-up, 50mm. Huge eyes reflect a spinning white scoop, then pull fast to a wide shot, 35mm, revealing the figure frozen mid-skid as the vendor presents the brass paddle like a stage trick. SFX: sharp gasp, bell flutter, fountain splash. 0:02-0:04: Match cut into The First Miss. Close-up, 50mm. Hands clap shut on empty air as the cone snaps upward. The face stays frozen while the pupils tilt up. SFX: quick whoosh, soft clap, tiny squeak, crowd chuckle. 0:04-0:07: Cut on action into The Side Switch. Medium wide shot, 35mm. The vendor slides the paddle behind his back and pops the cone out on the other side. The figure lunges left, scrambles right, and pinwheels in place. A tea glass rattles on a nearby table. SFX: paddle swishes, shoe skids, glass clink, growing laughter. 0:07-0:09: Reaction cut into The Fake Victory. Medium close-up, 50mm. The cone lands in the waiting hand and the face bursts into victory, then the vendor peels the stretchy scoop away in one smooth move, leaving the cone bare for a beat. SFX: victory chime cut short, peel wobble, laughter pop, offended inhale. 0:09-0:11: Insert cut into The Public Humiliation. Insert shot of a ceramic cat staring from a shelf. Smash cut to a medium shot, 35mm, as the figure sags into noodle posture, then puffs both cheeks and folds both arms while onlookers bounce with silent laughter. SFX: tiny huff, crowd laughter swell, cart bell tinkle. 0:11-0:15: Whip pan transition into The Real Win. Medium close-up, 50mm. The vendor kneels and places the cone gently into the waiting hand with no trick this time. One still beat. The figure looks down, eyes sparkle, then the camera pulls back to a wide shot, 35mm, as the figure leans in for the first taste and the courtyard breaks into applause. SFX: soft handoff, held-breath pause, bright chime bloom, applause burst, warm music lift.
prompts.author: @grok

prompts.display_text: Cinematic Horror Zombie Movie Trailer Style: Dark desaturated color grading, dramatic cinematic lighting, 24fps film grain, Hollywood blockbuster intensity. [0s–2s] Sweeping aerial shot descending over a devastated burning city at twilight. Crumbling skyscrapers, thick black smoke, distant explosions flashing across the horizon. Ash and red haze filling the sky. [2s–4s] Hard cut to medium close-up of a battle-worn male survivor standing on a rooftop gripping a shotgun. Face smeared with blood and dirt, staring down at the chaos below, speaking through gritted teeth. [4s–6s] Smash cut to street-level tracking shot racing through a destroyed avenue. Overturned burning military vehicles. A squad of armed survivors sprinting through wreckage, firing rifles behind them as a massive zombie horde crashes through a barricade. [6s–8s] Quick cut to low-angle action shot of a female soldier sliding across the hood of a wrecked car. Firing dual pistols into a wave of zombies lunging from all sides. Shell casings flying. [8s–10s] Cut to extreme close-up of a zombie's decayed face snapping toward camera with a guttural scream. Rapid pull-back revealing thousands of zombies flooding through collapsed city walls like a tidal wave, overwhelming military blockades. [10s–12s] Cut to dark bunker interior with flickering red emergency lights. A military commander slamming his fist on a table covered in maps. [12s–14s] Smash cut to rapid-fire montage: Explosions. Helicopter spiraling down. Zombies climbing skyscrapers. Survivor swinging an axe. Buildings collapsing in dust clouds. Each shot half a second. [14s–15s] Hard cut to black silence. Title CALL OF THE DEAD slams onto screen in cracked blood-red font. Single zombie growl echoes.
prompts.author: @avocadoai_co

prompts.display_text: Dramatic low-angle tracking shot speeding along rain-slicked train tracks through a narrow mountain gorge. Dark rocky cliff walls rise on both sides, with overhead bridges and power lines crossing above. Moody overcast sky. The camera rushes forward at high speed. Two women — one with pink hair in all-black tactical gear, the other in a white bodysuit — fight on top of the moving train, exchanging martial arts blows as sparks fly. Dynamic action choreography, dark teal-grey color grade, cinematic speed and motion blur, sci-fi action film aesthetic. LOCURA!

prompts.display_text: A high-energy fifteen-second continuous single-take visual effects short. A lone surfer rides atop a massive translucent light-whale, diving through a vast floating ocean suspended in the sky. Music is ethereal electronic pulses, each beat synchronized with visual shifts. Physical continuity is absolutely clear. The light-whale's body flows like liquid glass, with shifting bioluminescent currents pulsing within. Camera starts at an ultra-low angle rushing toward the surfer's feet, the crystalline board slicing through suspended water, droplets arcing outward in curved trajectories. The surfer's toes grip the board, every muscle twitch visible. Camera climbs rapidly up the whale's glowing spine. Its skin is transparent like, internal light pulsing like breath. Camera cuts hard to an extreme close-up of the surfer's face—only eyes and brow, background dissolved into light streaks. Wind pressure flutters her eyelashes, pupils slightly contracted from speed. Her gaze is intense and alive. They plunge downward through layers of floating water-islands and suspended tides. Camera whips right, capturing them skimming between two colossal floating coral structures, their surfaces pulsing with slow light. Slow motion activates: jellyfish the size of buildings drift past the lens, tentacles stretching into silk-thin trails of light. The surfer shifts weight on the crystalline board, carving along the whale's twisting back. The whale begins a spiraling dive through vertical suspended currents. Camera orbits them at high speed, rotation synchronized with the spiral, the floating ocean background stretching into cyan and gold light bands. The whale's eye now forms—not a traditional eyeball, but every bioluminescent vein in its body suddenly converging toward its head, forming an incandescent core of light. The core contracts then expands, like a pupil focusing. Camera cuts hard to an extreme close-up of this light-core. It is gazing at the surfer, as if checking she is safe. They burst through a dense field of glowing plankton. Particles explode outward, trailing behind like stardust. The whale breaches a suspended waterfall, the water body shattering into billions of floating droplets. Super slow motion: every droplet hangs frozen mid-air, refracting golden sunlight, the surfer's hair leaving a reflection on each droplet's surface. The surfer flips her body, threading through a gap barely wide enough for one person between two converging tidal streams. Camera cuts to a side profile—only inches between her and the crushing water. Time resumes at full speed. Floating reefs pulse like heartbeats, airborne fish schools shift like galaxies, distant sky currents ripple like breathing oceans. Golden sunlight pierces through layers of suspended water, refracting into moving beams that dance across every surface. The whale arcs upward, breaching through the sky-ceiling into open air. In the final moment, the whale looks back—the light-core at its head pulses once, like a farewell—then releases a radiant ring of light that ripples outward across the entire floating ocean. Camera pulls back rapidly, the silhouettes of whale and surfer consumed by light. Frame freezes at the farthest edge of the expanding light wave. Rules: New composition every single second. Must include: surfer eye extreme close-up, feet-on-crystal-board close-up, whale light-pupil extreme close-up, suspended water droplet close-up. Music is ethereal electronic pulses synchronized to visuals. No humans clipping. No text or watermark. Let AI freely interpret light refraction and droplet trajectories.

prompts.display_text: A fast-paced, highly cinematic live-action commercial shot in a modern metropolis at dawn. 0-3s (City Awakening): Wide drone shot over a glowing modern city skyline at sunrise. Rapid, smooth zoom down to street level, focusing on a realistic young woman (blonde hair, light eyes, athletic pink top) tying her sneaker on a concrete step. 3-6s (Lace Up & Logo Reveal): Extreme close-up. She pulls the laces tight swiftly. The camera tracks smoothly along the side of the sleek running shoe, revealing a premium, reflective metal "el.cine" logo embedded into the mesh. 6-9s (Kinetic Sprint): Tracking shot from a moving vehicle. She sprints powerfully down the empty city street. The camera stays low, focusing on the dynamic impact of the futuristic sneakers on the pavement, with subtle glowing orange energy dispersing with every step. 9-12s (Drone Helix Spin): As she leaps over a puddle, an FPV drone camera executes a rapid, 360-degree helix spin around her in mid-air. The scene slows into brief bullet-time, perfectly highlighting her focused expression and the shoes. 12-15s (End Graphic): She lands smoothly and continues running out of frame. The camera stops abruptly, and crisp white text seamlessly appears in the center of the screen: "designed by el.cine".

prompts.display_text: Cinematic high-energy multi-shot video, 15 rapid dynamic shots telling a complete story, fast-paced night market setup race against time, consistent young woman in her mid-20s, shoulder-length wavy black hair tied in a loose bun, warm brown skin, bright red apron over white t-shirt, jeans, energetic determined smile turning to relief, freckles on cheeks, realistic detailed face and hands, vibrant colorful night market lighting with neon signs and warm string lights, steam from food, bustling atmosphere. Shot 1: Close-up on her phone alarm showing "Market opens in 15 min", she jolts awake in a small cluttered kitchen, eyes wide with panic, jumps up and starts grabbing ingredients. Handheld urgent camera, tense upbeat music starts. Shot 2: Medium tracking shot from behind, the same young woman in her mid-20s with shoulder-length wavy black hair in loose bun, red apron over white t-shirt, rushes down narrow apartment stairs carrying heavy bags of vegetables and spices, bags bouncing, heavy breathing audio. Shot 3: Quick cut to exterior wide shot of bustling night market street at dusk, neon lights flickering on, the same young woman in her mid-20s with shoulder-length wavy black hair in loose bun, red apron, bursts out onto the street weaving through early shoppers. Shot 4: Dynamic over-the-shoulder medium shot following the same young woman in her mid-20s with shoulder-length wavy black hair in loose bun, red apron, as she runs along crowded market lane dodging pedestrians and bicycles, ponytail swinging slightly, excited nervous expression, fast dolly forward with colorful neon reflections. Shot 5: Close-up on her sneakers pounding wet pavement mixed with close-up on her determined face checking watch, sweat on forehead, shallow depth of field, rhythmic running footsteps and market hum SFX. Shot 6: Low-angle fast tracking shot as the same young woman in her mid-20s with shoulder-length wavy black hair in loose bun, red apron, dashes across a busy intersection just before traffic, food bags swinging, dramatic neon lens flares. Shot 7: Medium side shot, she arrives at her empty stall spot, skids to a stop, quickly unpacks a folding table, intense focus, first metal clanging sounds. Shot 8: POV from her view setting up, hands rapidly arranging fresh vegetables, sauces, and a small grill, slight handheld shake, steam beginning to rise, sizzling anticipation audio. Shot 9: Cut back to her face, the same young woman in her mid-20s with shoulder-length wavy black hair in loose bun, red apron, ecstatic as first customer approaches, rapid hand movements preparing a sample dish, quick push-in on her proud smile. Shot 10: Wide orbiting shot around the stall as she lights the grill and arranges colorful ingredients, warm string lights turning on above, wind in her hair, music building tension. Shot 11: Extreme long shot from above showing the market coming alive with lights while she finishes setup, the same young woman in her mid-20s with shoulder-length wavy black hair in loose bun, red apron, breathing heavily but smiling. Shot 12: Close-up on her hands flipping the first batch of street food on the grill, golden flames and steam, focused grin, satisfying sizzle SFX. Shot 13: Medium shot from behind as she serves the first customer, bright neon lights bathing the scene, multiple happy interactions starting, warm color grading intensifies. Shot 14: Slow-motion close-up on her face as she wipes sweat and looks at the now-busy successful stall, pure joy and relief, eyes sparkling under market lights, triumphant music peak with crowd cheers. Shot 15: Final wide pull-out shot showing her confidently working the packed stall in the vibrant glowing night market, satisfied laugh, ambient market sounds and gentle steam, fade out on energetic atmosphere.

prompts.display_text: First-person POV of a motorcycle rider, hands gripping handlebars tightly, subtle body movement reacting to terrain, full focus and tension. POV shot accelerating on a razor-thin dirt path carved into a cliff. Massive drop visible on both sides. Wind rushing loudly. Camera slightly unstable, subtle head movement. Path narrows even more. Left side—endless void. Right side—vertical rock wall inches away. Bike leans sharply to avoid scraping. Sudden uneven terrain. Front dips slightly. Hands tighten on handlebars. Small rocks fall off the edge into the abyss. Sharp turn ahead. Rider brakes slightly, then leans aggressively. Camera tilts with the movement—extreme vertigo effect. Close to the edge. One wheel nearly slips. Tiny correction saves balance at the last second. Acceleration again. Path becomes unstable, crumbling edges. Dust and debris falling into the void. Final straight. Full speed. Camera slightly tilts downward revealing the immense depth below. Wind intensifies. End on forward rush. Camera True first-person POV, micro head movements, subtle shake, tilt synced with bike lean, immersive tracking Narrow cliffside path, deep abyss on both sides, rocky textures, falling debris, high altitude environment Ultra realistic, extreme vertigo sensation, cinematic immersion, natural lighting, strong depth perception, fluid motion, no distortion, no stretching

prompts.display_text: cinematic sequence, perfect anime 2D cel-shaded style, continuous single-take camera flythrough with rapid lateral drifts and rollercoaster momentum, high motion coherence, 24FPS feel with generous animation frames. REFERENCE: - Use [アット]mage1 as EXACT character lock for IDOL GIRL: young woman, long straight black hair with blunt bangs, large psychedelic spiral eyes (concentric rainbow rings), iridescent pale skin with holographic sheen, black sleeveless top with white pointed collar featuring embroidered psychedelic flower brooch and ribbon tie, long green A-line skirt covered in swirling paisley and floral pattern (pink, orange, yellow, green), iridescent lavender platform Mary Jane shoes, small pink stud earring on right ear. - Use [アット] as EXACT character lock for NYAN: round chubby orange tabby cat, large golden-olive eyes with cross-shaped sigil pupils, pink nose, orange fur with bold black stripe patches, cream-white belly, orange-and-black striped tail, small golden tags on body, short stubby legs, soft round silhouette. - Use [アット] as EXACT character lock for FUSINYAN: sitting pastel cat, soft lavender-white fur with pink and mint-green watercolor patches, heterochromatic op-art eyes (left eye red concentric target, right eye blue concentric spiral), red nose, black bands on lower back with rainbow stripe inlays, pink-and-mint striped tail with black tip, round plush body, small eye-like symbols on sides. AUDIO: upbeat J-pop instrumental, bright synth chords, bouncy bass line, sparkling chime accents. No voice, no dialogue. [0.0–3.0s] FAST FORWARD DOLLY through an infinite pastel sky filled with drifting candy-colored confetti, holographic bubbles, and spinning star particles — camera rockets forward at high speed, slight barrel-roll rotation, streaks of pink and mint light whipping past the lens. Foreground wipes: giant pastel lollipops, ribbons, and cat-paw-shaped sparkles fly past camera. [3.0–6.0s] Camera sweeps right and PUSHES IN on IDOL GIRL sitting cross-legged on a giant floating macaroon throne, chin resting on one hand, psychedelic eyes glowing with slow spiral rotation. She notices camera — eyes widen, she breaks into a bright smile and tosses a handful of glitter directly at the lens. Confetti explosion fills the frame. CAMERA: medium shot → extreme close-up on spiral eyes during smile. [6.0–9.0s] Camera WHIP-PANS left and ARCS AROUND NYAN mid-leap — all four paws spread wide, mouth open in a big cheerful meow, golden eyes sparkling. Tiny holographic fish swirl around him. Camera completes a 180-degree arc as NYAN does a spinning somersault, tail curling into a heart shape at the apex. Speed lines and star bursts radiate from his body. CAMERA: low-angle tracking arc, dynamic motion blur on the spin. [9.0–12.0s] Camera DRIFTS LATERALLY and finds FUSINYAN sitting perfectly still on a floating crystal ball, one paw raised to her mouth in a "shh" gesture, heterochromatic eyes pulsing — left eye's red target ripples outward, right eye's blue spiral slowly rotates. Psychedelic energy rings radiate gently from her body in pastel rainbow waves. Camera DOLLIES IN SLOWLY — mysterious, calm contrast to the previous energy. CAMERA: medium shot → medium close-up, gentle dolly-in. [12.0–15.0s] Camera PULLS BACK into an EXTREME LONG SHOT — all three characters arranged in a triangle formation floating in the pastel void. IDOL GIRL standing center-back with arms spread wide, NYAN bouncing on her right shoulder, FUSINYAN perched regally on her left shoulder. Massive burst of rainbow confetti and holographic light rays explode behind them. Camera holds the final tableau with a subtle slow push-in. CAMERA: extreme long shot with slow dolly-in to full shot. Infinite pastel sky environment, maximum emphasis on character personality and joyful energy, perfect face/body consistency from references, bright candy-colored anime lighting with soft rim lights and sparkling highlights, no dark shadows, no weapons, no blood, no realistic textures, 1080p quality. 今回のPromptは、タイムテーブル型を採用しました。 めっちゃ素敵なアニメのOPになった😍 yachimatさん ありがとうございます。

high motion coherence, 24FPS feel with generous animation frames.

REFERENCE:
- Use ［アット］mage1 as EXACT character lock for IDOL GIRL: young woman, long straight black hair
  with blunt bangs, large psychedelic spiral eyes (concentric rainbow rings),
  iridescent pale skin with holographic sheen, black sleeveless top with white pointed collar
  featuring embroidered psychedelic flower brooch and ribbon tie, long green A-line skirt
  covered in swirling paisley and floral pattern (pink, orange, yellow, green),
  iridescent lavender platform Mary Jane shoes, small pink stud earring on right ear.
- Use ［アット］ as EXACT character lock for NYAN: round chubby orange tabby cat,
  large golden-olive eyes with cross-shaped sigil pupils, pink nose, orange fur with
  bold black stripe patches, cream-white belly, orange-and-black striped tail,
  small golden tags on body, short stubby legs, soft round silhouette.
- Use ［アット］ as EXACT character lock for FUSINYAN: sitting pastel cat,
  soft lavender-white fur with pink and mint-green watercolor patches,
  heterochromatic op-art eyes (left eye red concentric target, right eye blue concentric spiral),
  red nose, black bands on lower back with rainbow stripe inlays,
  pink-and-mint striped tail with black tip, round plush body, small eye-like symbols on sides.

AUDIO: upbeat J-pop instrumental, bright synth chords, bouncy bass line, sparkling chime accents.
No voice, no dialogue.

[0.0–3.0s] FAST FORWARD DOLLY through an infinite pastel sky filled with drifting candy-colored
confetti, holographic bubbles, and spinning star particles — camera rockets forward at high speed,
slight barrel-roll rotation, streaks of pink and mint light whipping past the lens.
Foreground wipes: giant pastel lollipops, ribbons, and cat-paw-shaped sparkles fly past camera.

[3.0–6.0s] Camera sweeps right and PUSHES IN on IDOL GIRL sitting cross-legged on a giant
floating macaroon throne, chin resting on one hand, psychedelic eyes glowing with slow spiral
rotation. She notices camera — eyes widen, she breaks into a bright smile and tosses a handful
of glitter directly at the lens. Confetti explosion fills the frame.
CAMERA: medium shot → extreme close-up on spiral eyes during smile.

[6.0–9.0s] Camera WHIP-PANS left and ARCS AROUND NYAN mid-leap — all four paws spread wide,
mouth open in a big cheerful meow, golden eyes sparkling. Tiny holographic fish swirl around him.
Camera completes a 180-degree arc as NYAN does a spinning somersault, tail curling into
a heart shape at the apex. Speed lines and star bursts radiate from his body.
CAMERA: low-angle tracking arc, dynamic motion blur on the spin.

[9.0–12.0s] Camera DRIFTS LATERALLY and finds FUSINYAN sitting perfectly still on a floating
crystal ball, one paw raised to her mouth in a "shh" gesture, heterochromatic eyes pulsing —
left eye's red target ripples outward, right eye's blue spiral slowly rotates.
Psychedelic energy rings radiate gently from her body in pastel rainbow waves.
Camera DOLLIES IN SLOWLY — mysterious, calm contrast to the previous energy.
CAMERA: medium shot → medium close-up, gentle dolly-in.

[12.0–15.0s] Camera PULLS BACK into an EXTREME LONG SHOT — all three characters arranged in
a triangle formation floating in the pastel void. IDOL GIRL standing center-back with arms
spread wide, NYAN bouncing on her right shoulder, FUSINYAN perched regally on her left shoulder.
Massive burst of rainbow confetti and holographic light rays explode behind them.
Camera holds the final tableau with a subtle slow push-in.
CAMERA: extreme long shot with slow dolly-in to full shot.

Infinite pastel sky environment, maximum emphasis on character personality and joyful energy,
perfect face/body consistency from references, bright candy-colored anime lighting with
soft rim lights and sparkling highlights, no dark shadows, no weapons, no blood,
no realistic textures, 1080p quality.

今回のPromptは、タイムテーブル型を採用しました。

prompts.display_text: 15-second cinematic Japanese drama pure love ambiguous short film, ultra-realistic photorealistic quality. Afternoon empty classroom bathed in warm golden sunlight streaming through Venetian blinds onto rows of old wooden desks. Delicate dust particles drift slowly in the light beams. Extremely natural micro-movements, breathing, and eye contact tension. Characters maintain perfect facial consistency, clothing, and hairstyle throughout no deformation, no drifting, no artifacts. Subtle realistic chest rises and falls synchronized with breathing. Shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh background, warm film grain, razor-sharp 8K. Japanese youth-style restrained, heart-fluttering, almost suffocating romantic atmosphere.0-4 seconds: Extremely slow push-in shot from medium desk view to side-profile close-up of the two students sitting side by side. Pure and innocent girl in summer school uniform, head slightly lowered as she focuses on writing notes. Long black hair with soft strands gently lifted by a breeze near her ear. Long eyelashes casting delicate shadows. Naturally flushed, soft skin. Corners of her mouth unconsciously curve upward in quiet concentration. Light, even breathing.4-9 seconds: Cut to the boy in close-up. School uniform collar slightly loosened, elbow on the desk, secretly turning his head to gaze at her. Eyes full of gentle, restrained affection and tenderness. Pupils slightly dilated. Adam’s apple bobs softly. Suddenly noticing her pen pause, he panics and quickly turns back to pretend to look at his own notes. Ear tips flush with a faint red. Fingertips tremble slightly as he grips the pen. Occasionally steals a glance at her from under his bangs. Breathing becomes slightly unsteady, lips pressed tightly as he tries to stay calm.9-15 seconds: Extreme dual close-up of both faces in the same frame, slow-motion. Their eyes suddenly meet. The girl slowly turns her head, first with a hazy, surprised expression, then quickly lowers her gaze in embarrassment for 0.3 seconds, gently biting her lower lip. Cheeks and earlobes instantly bloom with cherry-blossom pink. Moist eyelashes timidly lift as she looks back at him. At the same time, she shyly whispers in a soft voice, “......What are you looking at?” The boy freezes completely, pupils dilating, stunned for 0.4 seconds, then stammers in a flustered whisper, “N... nothing.” The girl bites her lip again, steals another glance at him, and whispers even softer, “......You’re lying.” The boy pauses, then lets out a gentle sigh and replies tenderly, “......Just looking at you.” His mouth slowly curves into a shy, gentle, lopsided smile. Fine smile lines appear at the corners of his eyes. Breathing noticeably deeper. An invisible electric current seems to crackle between their faces, pulling them together with thick, ambiguous tension. They share each other’s breath and warmth. The background completely melts into layered creamy dreamlike light spots and a warm glowing haze filled with floating fine particles.Lip sync is perfectly natural and precise. Emotional micro-expressions and breathing are synchronized. Dialogue delivered in low-energy, shy whispers with natural pauses of 200 - 400 milliseconds. Mouths move only when speaking no exaggeration, no robotic feel, perfectly natural lip-sync with authentic emotion.Overall audio: Distant summer cicada sounds faintly in the background, soft scratching of pen on paper, almost inaudible low-frequency heartbeats from both, and finally a gentle fade-in of airy piano. Dialogue is completely natural whispered lines embedded in the scene. Girl’s voice is soft, sweet, and shy. Boy’s voice shifts from panicked stuttering to gentle warmth.Throughout the entire clip, characters remain fully consistent in identity. Realistic subtle head tilts, eye movements, and synchronized breathing. No text, watermarks, or subtitles. Pure Japanese teenage secret crush, heart-fluttering suspense.

prompts.display_text: [0:00–0:02] — Establishing shot: Wide cinematic shot from low angle, a matte black sports car accelerates out of a tunnel into a rain-slicked neon-lit city street at night. Headlights cut through dense fog. Wet asphalt reflects red and cyan neon signs. Camera locked off with subtle lens flare. Sound: deep engine roar building from silence, tires screaming on wet road. [0:02–0:05] — Action close-up: Extreme close-up of the driver's gloved hands gripping the steering wheel, intense eyes in the rearview mirror. Quick rack focus from hands to dashboard gauges climbing into the red zone. Handheld camera with slight tremor, 50mm normal lens. Lighting: hard chiaroscuro from instrument cluster glow, deep shadows on face. Sound: turbo whine, heartbeat sfx rising in mix. [0:05–0:08] — Slow motion hero moment: Ultra slow motion (0.2x speed), the car drifts sideways through a neon-soaked intersection. Water particles suspended in air, tire smoke trails in slow arcs. Camera: low side-angle dolly tracking shot, 24mm wide lens. Lighting transitions from cool blue to warm amber golden as street lights blur into bokeh streaks. Color grade: teal and orange high-contrast film look. Sound: engine pitch drops into deep slow-motion rumble, cinematic bass hit sfx. [0:08–0:10] — Climax aerial pull-back: Rapid cut to overhead drone-style pull-back shot, the car disappears into a tunnel of city lights. Final frame holds on neon reflections on wet pavement. Lighting: cool blue twilight, volumetric light shafts from streetlamps through fog. Camera: steady dolly out with slight upward tilt. Sound: cinematic whoosh + reverb tail fade to silence. Style: 35mm film grain, Kodak Vision3 color palette, anamorphic lens flare. Cinematic 2.39:1 aspect ratio. No camera shake during slow motion segment. Hyper-realistic physics, photoreal rendering.

prompts.display_text: An adrenaline-filled, fast-moving live-action commercial with energetic parkour movements. 0-3s (The Drop): A sudden, fast-falling perspective shot looking down the side of a concrete staircase. The blonde woman vaults over the railing, dropping gracefully into the frame. 3-6s (Impact & Branding): Low-angle close-up. Her sneakers hit the ground with immense power. The camera executes a fast snap-pan to the side of the shoe, clearly showing a rugged, embossed "el.cine" logo on the heel. 6-9s (Continuous Flow): A continuous, fast-paced tracking shot runs alongside her as she swiftly navigates urban obstacles—leaping over benches and sliding under barriers. The camera captures the fluid, realistic motion of her body and the flexibility of the footwear. 9-12s (The Vault): She performs a powerful vault toward the camera. Time slows down dramatically mid-vault. The camera orbits 180 degrees, keeping the intricate design of the bottom sole and the side logo in center focus against the bright blue sky. 12-15s (End Graphic): Real-time resumes as she lands cleanly. A quick whip-pan transitions the scene into a solid background where the bold text appears: "designed by el.cine"

prompts.display_text: FORMAT: 15s / 145 BPM / 6 SHOTS / Suspense routine SUBJECT: @image_1 WARDROBE: Prehistoric caveman clothes ENVIRONMENT: A magical time portal in prehistoric wasteland MOOD: Intense suspense and sudden action MUSIC: Suspenseful, magical Jurassic sounds COLOR LOGIC: Brown desolate wasteland colors with magical dusty colors STYLE: Ultra-Realistic. LOGIC RULE: Keep logical consistency in wardrobe, props, locations, and action continuity across all shots. SHOT 1: ECU, 85mm push-in / 06:50 Lightning strikes in the distance, magical colors sparkle on and around the portal, SHOT 2: WS, 35mm handheld jolt / Rhythmic cut to a caveman running towards the portal. He is looking over his shoulder as a Mammoth running towards him gets closer SHOT 3: MCU, 50mm slide / Cut portal view as the caveman walks through the magic portal and disappears in a wave of colors within the portal. SHOT 4: Insert shot, 85mm rack focus / Match cut to a point of view from behind the mammoth who sees the caveman vanish in the portal SHOT 5: drone side view of the mammoth looking at the portal, 24mm wide / the mammoth walks up to the portal and sniffs it SHOT 6: Insert shot, 50mm handheld / the mammoth runs through the portal and vanishes "

I did something similar to this with this same image many months ago. It was very hard and took so much effort. This is first try with a single prompt using #Seedance2  Prompt "Prompt: FORMAT: 15s / 145 BPM / 6 SHOTS / Suspense  routine

SUBJECT: @image_1

WARDROBE: Prehistoric caveman clothes

ENVIRONMENT: A magical time portal in prehistoric wasteland

MOOD: Intense suspense and sudden action

MUSIC: Suspenseful, magical Jurassic sounds

COLOR LOGIC: Brown desolate wasteland colors with magical dusty colors

STYLE: Ultra-Realistic.

LOGIC RULE: Keep logical consistency in wardrobe, props, locations, and action continuity across all shots.

SHOT 1: ECU, 85mm push-in / 06:50 Lightning strikes in the distance, magical colors sparkle on and around the portal,

SHOT 2: WS, 35mm handheld jolt / Rhythmic cut to a caveman running towards the portal. He is looking over his shoulder as a Mammoth running towards him gets closer

SHOT 3: MCU, 50mm slide / Cut portal view as the caveman walks through the magic portal and disappears in a wave of colors within the portal.

SHOT 4: Insert shot, 85mm rack focus / Match cut to a point of view from behind the mammoth who sees the caveman vanish in the portal

SHOT 5: drone side view of the mammoth looking at the portal, 24mm wide / the mammoth walks up to the portal and sniffs it

SHOT 6: Insert shot, 50mm handheld / the mammoth runs through the portal and vanishes "

SHOT 4: Insert shot, 85mm rack focus / Match cut to a point of view from behind the mammoth who sees the caveman vanish in the portal SHOT 5: drone side view of the mammoth looking at the portal, 24mm wide / the mammoth walks up to the portal and sniffs it SHOT 6: Insert shot, 50mm handheld / the mammoth runs through the portal and vanishes "

prompts.display_text: First of all, here is the prompt you need and the Lovart website. https:// lovart.ai/?sourceId=9020 25 ... Style: Hyper-realistic sci-fi action, cinematic Japanese blockbuster Setting: Tokyo under alien invasion — destroyed streets, fire, debris, alien ships in the sky Sound: Explosions, distant sirens, alien drones, rising orchestral + electronic score Energy: Fast, dramatic, escalating into transformation 0–2s HOOK Wide chaotic shot of Tokyo in ruins. Buildings damaged, fires burning, alien ships hovering overhead. Camera drops quickly into street level—handheld, shaky. A Japanese woman stands in the middle of destruction, breathing heavily. 2–4s Close-up on her face—dirt, sweat, eyes burning with anger. Wind and debris blow past her. She shouts with fury: 「ふざけるな...ここは私たちの世界だ!」 (“Don’t mess with us... this is our world!”) 4–6s Alien drones descend rapidly around her. Energy blasts hit the ground nearby—explosions erupt. She clenches her fists—her body starts trembling with force. 6–8s TRANSFORMATION BEGINS Energy surges through her body. Glowing lines spread across her skin like circuitry. She screams: 「全部...壊してやる!」 (“I’ll destroy all of you!”) 8–10s Armor begins forming dynamically: Metallic plates emerge from light Pieces lock onto her arms, shoulders, chest Helmet starts assembling around her head Camera: Fast orbit, cinematic motion blur 10–12s Full armored warrior now—sleek sci-fi suit, glowing accents. She launches forward at extreme speed toward incoming aliens. Camera: Tracking shot, aggressive forward motion SFX: Sonic burst + energy trail 12–14s Mid-air combat: She strikes an alien with a powerful punch—impact shockwave distorts the air. Follows with rapid combo attacks. Explosions and debris fly around. 14–15s END She lands hard, sliding slightly across the ground. Looks up slowly—armor glowing, eyes intense behind visor. Alien ships still looming above. Final line (calm, deadly): 「まだ終わってない。」 (“It’s not over yet.”) Cut to black on rising sound.

prompts.display_text: 15-second text-to-video continuous single-take sequence. Raw 70s/80s grindhouse horror style. Heavy analog film grain, high contrast, photorealistic practical effects. Heavy speed ramps. NO CUTS. [SUBJECT DESCRIPTIONS] - HEROINE: Ultimate 80s grindhouse final girl, striking athletic early 20s. Wet messy hair, fierce determined expression. Wearing a dark high-cut 80s athletic one-piece swimsuit. Alluring yet lethal. - THE MONSTER: Slimy aquatic beast with dark scales, jagged teeth, milky dead eyes, muscular and visceral. [TIMELINE SCRIPT] 0–3s: [THE DEEP END] Action: She treads water frantically as a massive slimy silhouette rises fast from the pool drain. Camera: Underwater low-angle looking up at her floating silhouette with distorted neon surface light. Audio: Muffled bass, panicked breathing, distant synthwave. 3–6s: [THE AMBUSH] Action: Beast lunges upward. She contorts backward in extreme slow-motion as its jaws snap inches from her face. Camera: Fast underwater orbit locking into tight profile. Audio: Violent water rush dropping to heavy sub-bass hum. 6–9s: [THE GRAPPLE] Action: Beast grabs her thigh. She twists and drives her heel brutally into its snout. Camera: Shaky handheld underwater medium shot. Audio: Thudding impacts, monstrous screech, frantic thrashing. 9–12s: [THE DRAW] Action: She propels backward and draws a serrated dive knife from her calf in elegant slow-motion. Camera: Slight dolly-back into heroic tense framing. Audio: Echoing metallic *schwing* + rising 80s horror synth swell. 12–15s: [THE STRIKE] Action: Beast charges. She lunges forward and drives the knife deep into its skull as they sink into darkness. Camera: Slow tilt-down watching them plunge into the deep end. Audio: Brutal muffled puncture thud fading into crushing underwater silence. [CONSTRAINTS] Single unbroken take. Strictly photorealistic 80s grindhouse look. Accurate underwater physics, light refraction, and bubble dynamics.

prompts.display_text: Video prompt seedance 2.0 - 15s text to video The Storm Shepherd vs the Glass Locust King A cinematic weather war. A nomadic shepherd in layered sky-blue robes stands on a high desert ridge during a sandstorm. He fights using a hooked crook, wind channels, and charged storm clouds. His enemy is a king locust made of translucent chitin, lightning veins, and a swarm-crown of crystal insects. The setting transitions from dune ridge → storm trench → lightning plateau → salt crater. 0–3 seconds: the locust king descends out of the storm with a shrieking crown of glass-winged insects. The shepherd drives his crook into the sand and pulls a vortex of wind upward, forcing the first wave of insects into a spiraling wall. Close-ups of cracked lips, cloth snapping, glass wings, and charged dust. 3–7 seconds: the locust king splinters into swarming formations that attack from every direction across a trench carved by wind. The shepherd walks into the storm, redirecting gusts with broad arm sweeps. Each movement creates visible wind corridors that slam the swarm into rock spires. Sand peels off the ground in ribbons. Close-ups of sandals sliding, storm static along the crook, chitin fractures, and lightning flicker under skin. 7–10 seconds: the battle climbs onto a lightning plateau. The locust king towers above him with a giant fan of translucent wings reflecting the whole storm. The shepherd raises both hands and pulls a fork of lightning out of the sky like a rope, then whips it in a massive arc that shears off half the swarm crown. Orbit camera, desert lightning, flying crystal limbs. 10–12 seconds: rapid tracking shot as the shepherd runs across a collapsing salt shelf while the king reforms and dives with all wings screaming. He hooks the crook into its thorax and drags it downward into a charged crater. 12–15 seconds: overhead slow fall into the salt crater as storm winds spiral inward. The shepherd lands first while the locust king breaks apart into rain, glass fragments, and dead static that spiderwebs through the salt. Final frame: one intact locust wing ringing in the wind. Style: epic storm fantasy, desert electricity, glass insect textures, sand and lightning choreography, high-contrast sky warfare.

prompts.display_text: Shot One: Everyday Home Scene Time Segment: 0:00 to 0:02 Shot Distance and Type: Medium shot, handheld follow-cam Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera subtly sways with the character's movements, with a light, upbeat, and lively rhythm. The camera follows the trajectory of the girl's arm waving, finally facing the prop she raises. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The girl is wearing white loungewear pajamas patterned with Crayon Shin-chan designs and a bear hairband. She holds a sheet of white paper rolled into the shape of a telescope. She first playfully waves this "paper telescope" with a smile on her face, then directly aims one end of the "paper telescope" at and fully presses it against the lens, using the physical darkness inside the paper tube to block the frame, creating a perfect transition medium. Visual Effects: No obvious effects, belonging to everyday real-light-and-shadow recording. Cleverly utilizes the dark circular hole inside the paper tube rolled into a telescope shape as a physical transition entry medium. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Warm white tones, bright. Mood is relaxed, everyday, and lively, laying the groundwork for the dramatic contrast to follow. Shot Two: Spacetime Tunnel Transition Time Segment: 0:02 to 0:04 Shot Distance and Type: Close-up transitioning to full wide shot, first-person perspective push-in Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera rapidly pushes forward at high speed, visually as if directly penetrating the inner hole of the "paper telescope" the girl pressed against the lens in the previous second, delivering an extremely strong visual impact and a sense of extreme speed. Main Subject Actions and Expression: No character subject, primarily showcasing the process of traversing space. Visual Effects: Intense CG visual effects, deep red vortex and wormhole effects with a strong sense of suction and spatial distortion, followed by bats flying out from the depths of the frame as visual guides. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Interwoven dark red and black. Mood shifts instantly from relaxed to mysterious, dangerous, and filled with a sense of the unknown. Shot Three: Vampire Princess Descends Time Segment: 0:04 to 0:06 Shot Distance and Type: Overhead full wide shot transitioning to medium shot, panning camera (downward pan) Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera pans from top to bottom, aligning with the character's upward gaze, with speed transitioning from fast to slow motion, creating tremendous visual tension. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The transformed vampire princess (white hair, elven ears, white ornate gown, red nails) gazes up at the lens from below, extending one hand toward the lens as if inviting or casting a spell, her expression alluring yet brimming with dangerous allure. Visual Effects: Strong slow-motion (high-frame-rate) treatment, with a large amount of red petals or light-spot particles drifting in the foreground, a red magical halo floating above the character's head, and a background of intersecting black Gothic tree branches and net-like structures. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Intense dark red blended with high-contrast cool white tones. Mood is mysterious, seductive, and infused with Gothic opulence. Shot Four: Alluring Freeze-Frame Time Segment: 0:06 to 0:09 Shot Distance and Type: Medium close-up, with a slight handheld push-pull feel Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera remains relatively fixed but with a breathing and subtle tremor sensation, syncing with the music's beat for a strong rhythmic pulse. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The character holds the extended-hand pose, lightly touching her lips with the other hand, her gaze locked directly on the lens, her expression radiating immense allure and oppressive intensity. Visual Effects: Incorporates frame-skipping, rapid flickers, subtle screen distortion (glitch-fault style), and radial blur effects, paired with high-frequency red light flashes to amplify visual impact and cyberpunk vibes. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Large areas of high-saturation red background, with the character at the absolute visual center. Mood is high-energy, intensely visually aggressive. Shot Five: Blood Moon Flight Time Segment: 0:09 to 0:12 Shot Distance and Type: Long shot, fixed camera Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera remains steady, with elements in the frame exhibiting a slow floating sensation. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The character unfurls massive demonic wings, hovering in the night sky in an expansive pose. Visual Effects: Grand scene compositing, with a massive blood moon in the background, rendered with dark red cloud layers; slow-motion flocks of bats accompany in flight, evoking a powerful epic atmosphere. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Dark fantasy tones dominated by black and red. Mood is grand, awe-inspiring, and brimming with dominance, perfectly echoing the video's theme.

prompts.display_text: Shot 2-1 (0s–5s) Medium shot, slow dolly in. A morning market in the fused city. Glowing plants grown by elves with magic stand alongside Earth's vegetables and fruits, and mithril trinkets forged by dwarves are arranged in wooden crates. An elf merchant with pointed ears exchanges goods with a smiling Earth human. A beastkin girl with animal ears and a tail curiously picks up an Earth fruit. Soft morning natural light, warm color temperature, cinematic, shallow depth of field. Narration (low, resonant male Japanese voice): "Elves brought magic, and dwarves brought technology." White Japanese subtitles at the bottom of the screen: "Elves brought magic, and dwarves brought technology." Shot 2-2 (5s–10s) Medium shot, slow horizontal pan. A street in the fused city. At the terrace seating of an Earth café, an elf woman shows a scroll inscribed with runes to an Earth student. In the background, a dwarf craftsman assembles a spirit-powered device alongside an Earth engineer. Street signs feature both Japanese and elvish script. Warm afternoon light, golden hour, warm color temperature, cinematic, film grain. Narration (low, resonant male Japanese voice): "Beastkin brought keen senses, and dwarves brought engineering. Each contribution reshaped everyday life." White Japanese subtitles at the bottom of the screen: "Beastkin brought keen senses, and dwarves brought engineering. Each contribution reshaped everyday life." Shot 2-3 (10s–15s) Wide shot, slow tilt up. A panoramic view of the fused city at dusk. Elven vines and dwarven gear decorations beautifully entwine the framework of Tokyo Tower, forming a magnificent hybrid structure. At the base in the plaza, Earth humans and elves run stalls together; in the sky, silhouettes of angel-like wings gracefully circle, while beastkin children race around with Earth children. Lighting blending sunset oranges with the pale blue glow of elven magic, a grand sense of scale, cinematic 4K, film grain. Narration (low, resonant male Japanese voice): "Where magic and science intertwine—a new world begins to turn." White Japanese subtitles at the bottom of the screen: "Where magic and science intertwine—a new world begins to turn."

prompts.display_text: A lone explorer with a headlamp enters a vast arctic ice cave, crystalline blue walls glittering in the narrow beam of light. Slow push-in follows through the cave entrance, each step crunching on frost, breath visible in the freezing air, the headlamp illuminating intricate ice formations that stretch into darkness. A deep rumble shakes loose ice from the ceiling. The camera shifts to urgent shaky handheld, swinging wildly as the explorer spins around, the headlamp catching glimpses of something massive moving in the shadows, sickly pale green bioluminescent veins pulsing along the cave walls. The perspective snaps to a wide static shot as the creature emerges fully, a towering insectoid horror covered in translucent ice-like chitin, green light pulsing from within its body, dwarfing the terrified explorer. Glacial blue ice environment, bioluminescent creature design, horror lighting. 16:9 cinematic.

prompts.display_text: Cinematic 16:9 ultra-detailed fantasy battle trailer in the mythical realm of Aetherion. Massive floating islands of glowing crystal and ancient moss-covered ruins drift through endless golden skies. A colossal ancient dragon named Eldrath leads a desperate alliance of silver-armored elves and griffin riders to defend the Heart Crystal against the Obsidian Sorcerer Lord Vespera and his legion of shadow-wreathed demons. Explosive wide aerial shots and dynamic tracking camera capture the chaos: lightning storms, glowing arrows, griffin dive-bombing, and swirling black vortexes. Emotional close-ups of Eldrath and the half-elf sorceress Lirael as they combine powers in a blinding supernova of light. prompts.display_text: cinematic romance, slow-burn emotional tone, one man and one woman only, both adults in their mid-20s, western-style leads, casual luxury wardrobe, dark quiet apartment living room at night, refined romantic tension, natural lip sync, no subtitles, no text on screen. Character continuity: Female lead: adult western woman, mid-20s, elegant natural beauty, long brunette hair with soft loose waves, minimal makeup, emotionally guarded but faintly amused, seated on the sofa. Outfit: soft ivory off-shoulder knit sweater, dark straight-leg jeans, barefoot, understated jewelry. Male lead: adult western man, mid-20s, handsome refined features, slightly messy dark hair, thin metal-frame glasses, calm warm expression. Outfit: charcoal knit sweater over a white T-shirt, dark trousers, sleeves pushed once, relaxed but polished. Environment: Upscale apartment living room, soft sofa, low coffee table, one warm lamp, deep evening shadows, muted neutral palette, intimate silence, shallow depth of field, premium film texture, modern romantic realism. 0-3s: Wide-to-medium slow push-in. She sits in one corner of the sofa with arms folded, looking away. He crosses the room and sits on the edge of the coffee table facing her, leaving a small respectful distance. Hold the silence and tension. 3-6s: Medium close-up on the man. He studies her face, voice low, calm, almost smiling: “I tried very hard to have an ordinary evening.” 6-9s: Close-up on the woman. She turns her eyes to him at last, cool but intrigued, with the faintest teasing edge: “And how did that go?” 9-12s: Close-up on the man. He lets out a quiet breath, gaze steady. He reaches toward a loose strand near her cheek, stopping just before touching: “Poorly. You were in all of it.” 12-15s: Side two-shot. She lightly catches his wrist before he pulls away, not rejecting him, only holding him there. A small unwilling smile appears: “That is not helping me stay angry.” Hold on the shared gaze, the restrained smile, and the unresolved tenderness. Motion and style rules: Slow elegant camera movement, meaningful pauses, micro-expressions, lingering eye contact, almost-touch tension, realistic hand motion, restrained acting, no kneeling, no raised voices, no crying, no extra characters, no exaggerated gestures, no waxy skin, no stiff posing, premium romantic realism, emotionally charged final frame.

prompts.display_text: : First-person perspective (POV), 8K hyper-realistic, 60fps fluid motion, dark fantasy aesthetic, cinematic lighting, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio. [00:00 - 00:05] SEGMENT 1: The Awakening (The Hook) "POV shot. Looking down at the user's hand (as seen in @image1 ), where glowing blue and black veins pulse with energy. The hand is gripping a swirling black and violet energy orb. The hand crushes the orb with a heavy grip. Instantly, a massive shockwave of purple lightning and dark smoke explodes outward. From the shadows on the ground, dozens of spectral, knight-like silhouettes with glowing eyes rise and kneel before the camera. The setting is a dark, ruined stone dungeon." [00:05 - 00:10] SEGMENT 2: The Onslaught & The Boss (The Body) "Fast-paced POV combat. The camera moves forward rapidly as the user's hand wields a jagged, glowing obsidian dagger, slashing through waves of grey stone monsters that crumble into dust upon impact. The shadow knights from segment one fight alongside the user. Suddenly, the ground shakes, and a colossal, 30-foot demonic titan with multiple red eyes and jagged armor emerges from the darkness, letting out a silent, earth-shaking roar. The user raises their left hand, charging a massive violet aura." [00:10 - 00:15] SEGMENT 3: The Final Surge (The Climax) "Extreme POV close-up. The user's hand reaches toward the giant titan. A colossal spectral shadow-giant manifests behind the camera, mimicking the user's movement. All the shadow energy in the room condenses into the user's palm. The user fires a massive beam of pure abyssal purple energy that pierces through the titan's chest. The titan slowly disintegrates into black ash and embers, its red eyes fading as it collapses. The screen shakes with a heavy bass effect as the purple veins on the user's arm glow one last time before fading to black." Cinematic gender transformation sequence: start with a male figure in a dark, mysterious environment, subtle seductive tension in body language. Begin slow transformation with close-ups on physical change: jawline softens, shoulders narrow, hips subtly shift, hair lengthens and flows. Sequence seamless and cinematic, slow motion transformation blending male to female form, film-like color grading, atmospheric shadows and highlights, polished visual flow, intense but elegant aesthetic. Skin ripples like liquid silk at the intersection, and clothing morphs seamlessly from a masculine jacket into flowing attire. Dramatic low-key lighting emphasizes contours, intricate textures, and the surreal transformation. Dynamic expression of surprise and awe. High contrast, 8k resolution. prompts.display_text: Setting: Dark fortress interior with towering metal structures. Teal/cyan illumination leaks through gaps between massive pillars. Metallic reflective floor. Character: White-haired girl with red eyes. Mechanical angel in white armor plating. Wings on her back emit blue energy. [1: HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT WITH BOOST TRAILS] Extreme top-down angle. A tiny white light point zigzags across the fortress trailing blue energy lines. Concentric sonic-boom rings expand at each turning point. Wind-pressure particles scatter off the metal floor below. [2: CHARACTER CLOSE-UP → WEAPON AIM → FIRE → EXTREME FACE CLOSE-UP] Hard cut to low-angle close-up — the angel with wings spread, energy blades aimed forward in firing stance. She fires. Then the camera begins an agonizingly slow, deliberate zoom toward her face. It continues until only her glowing red eyes fill the entire frame. Pure intimidation. [3: BOOSTER ADJUSTMENT → CHARGE → ENERGY MAX → BOOST] From the red-eye extreme close-up, blue energy vents intensify in stages — blue → bright white. The entire screen whites out. An explosive flash of energy release. [4: HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT WITH BOOST TRAILS] Immediately after whiteout she streaks across the fortress at extreme speed. Blue beam trails cut diagonally across the frame. A targeting reticle flickers for an instant. [5: KICK TOWARD CAMERA] She dives from above and drives a kick straight at the camera — extreme low-angle POV from the target's perspective. Her armored leg fills the frame. Wing jets fire for added impact. [6: SAME KICK FROM DIFFERENT ANGLE → EXPLOSION] The same kick replayed from a different camera angle. On contact: cyan/white explosion → thick energy dust cloud → the dust lights up from inside as a secondary blast erupts. [7: CLOSE-UP → WEAPON AIM → AUTO-TARGETING → FULL BARRAGE] Dust clears to reveal the angel with all wings fully deployed. Each blue energy blade independently auto-adjusts its aim — blue/purple electrical arcs crackle as targeting locks on. Then every blade fires at once — continuous rapid-fire barrage, the entire screen consumed by cyan/white explosions. [8: BOOSTER ADJUSTMENT → CHARGE → MAX BOOST → HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT] Energy vents charge up again in stages. Blue → white → whiteout → explosive jet blast. She rockets away trailing blue energy across the fortress. [9: WEAPON READY POSE] Against the teal fortress backdrop she holds a static pose, energy blades aimed forward, wings fully spread. A faint blue aura shimmers around her.

prompts.display_text: NASA APOLLO SPACESUIT A7L "WORN ON ANOTHER WORLD" DNA: July 20, 1969. 102 hours, 45 minutes, 40 seconds into the mission. One small step. Arri Alexa 65. Ultra-wide. Grain progressive — starts clinical-clean, ends at maximum as the lunar surface appears. Key light: cold fluorescent Mission Control white. Secondary: harsh unfiltered solar light — no atmosphere to diffuse it. Flares: none in the lab sequence. One single overwhelming flare as the visor catches unfiltered sunlight on the lunar surface. Background: white clean room → vacuum of space → lunar surface at Tranquility Base. 00:00–00:02 · THE LAYERS A single thread of nylon being measured under a magnifying glass by a white-gloved technician's hand. Then: cut to the 21 layers of the A7L suit being assembled simultaneously — each layer materializing and wrapping the suit form: the liquid cooling garment first, its tubes threading through the fabric like a vascular system. Then the pressure bladder. Then the restraint layer. Then the thermal micrometeorite garment. Each layer distinct, each critical. Camera cross-section view through all 21 layers simultaneously. 00:02–00:04.5 · THE HELMET Speed 30%. The polycarbonate helmet shell forms — perfectly spherical, flawless. The visor assembly drops in: the gold-coated visor — 24-karat gold, 0.0002 inches thick — pressing over the outer shell. Camera macro on the gold surface: it reflects everything in warm gold — including us. The neck ring locks with a quarter-turn — the mechanism designed to never, under any circumstances, fail. 00:04.5–00:07 · PRESSURIZATION Speed 8%. The most important moment. Air flowing into the suit — the pressure building to 3.75 psi. Camera inside the suit as it pressurizes: the fabric stiffening, the gloves expanding slightly. Every seal tested by the pressure itself. The suit becomes a world — a personal atmosphere, the only thing between a human being and the void. 00:07–00:10 · THE CLEAN ROOM Speed 15%. The suited figure — complete — standing in the white clean room under brutal fluorescent light. Technicians moving around it in blurred background. The suit reads in extraordinary detail: the layers visible at the seams, the connector ports, the PLSS backpack life support system mounting points. A visor drops over the helmet. The astronaut disappears inside. 00:10–00:13 · TRANQUILITY BASE Speed 3%. The surface of the Moon. The suit boot pressing into lunar regolith in ultra-slow motion — the print forming in dust that has not been disturbed in 4.5 billion years. Camera at surface level — the boot print in sharp focus, the horizon of the Moon in the background, the Earth hanging above it, the size of a marble. The suit in the background, the gold visor catching unfiltered solar light. The single most overwhelming flare of any film in this collection — total, white, sacred. 00:13–00:14.5 · THE REVEAL Speed 1% — absolute stillness. The A7L floating in the void — the Earth behind it at distance. The gold visor reflects the Earth. The Earth reflected in the suit designed to walk on the Moon. Everything is contained in this one reflection. 00:14.5–00:15 · END CARD Silence — total. Then a single radio crackle. NASA worm logo. "Worn once. Changed everything." No grain — this moment is too clear, too real. Hold. Fade.

prompts.display_text: : CHARACTERS: Define one figure in a Japanese festival mask with a staff at the curb, recoiling pedestrians at the sidewalk edge, and a colossal serpentine abyssal titan with a ridge-backed silhouette and city-scale mass that rises after the second strike. STAGE: Set Shibuya Crossing at night after rain with LED billboards, reflective asphalt, moving traffic, and clear geography before the street turns to liquid, keeps swallowing traffic, and opens beneath the masked figure. EMOTIONAL TARGET: Build from dread into epic ascent. COLOR LOGIC: Neon Noir TIMELINE: 00:00.0: Open on a high wide over the curb lanes at Shibuya Crossing. Hold the figure in a Japanese festival mask still against the crowd blur. SFX: crossing beeps, shoe chatter. 00:01.2: Hard cut to a 50mm dolly push on the Japanese mask. Let billboard light crawl across its lacquered surface. SFX: city wash narrows. 00:02.4: Insert cut to the right hand striking the asphalt with the staff for the first hit. Show the impact point clearly. SFX: wood crack, low hum. 00:03.6: Match cut to a ripple blasting through reflected neon on the road surface. Keep the ring centered and fast. SFX: sub-bass pulse. 00:04.8: Smash cut to a 28mm low wide. Let the asphalt soften and turn viscous around the first impact point before the liquid begins to spread. SFX: tar tear, liquid surge. 00:06.0: Hard cut to a front three-quarter wide as Shibuya lane paint slowly sags under the creeping surface. Drive the liquid outward in a heavy crawl. SFX: bubbling drain, horn choke. 00:07.2: Hard cut to moving cars starting to drop nose-first and sink mid-motion as the softened street finally gives way under them. Hold the delayed weight shift long enough to read it. SFX: horn choke, metal groan, glass rattle. 00:08.4: Hard cut wider as pedestrians recoil along the sidewalk edge and more moving cars keep dropping into the black surface behind them. Keep the masked figure centered on an unbroken patch of liquid. SFX: shouts, wave slap, horn choke. 00:09.6: Cut on action to a 35mm push-in. Let the masked figure plant the staff into that black surface for the second strike without breaking calm while cars continue sinking at the edges of frame. SFX: bass hit, rain hiss, metal groan. 00:10.8: Hard cut to a slow 85mm orbit. Reveal the black surface doming under the masked figure as the collapse continues behind them, then split it open in a tight circle around their feet. SFX: deep groan, resonance, distant impacts. 00:12.0: Land on a 24mm crane pullback. Reveal a colossal serpentine abyssal titan rising through that opening directly under the masked figure and lifting them on its head above the liquefied Shibuya Crossing while its long ridge-backed body coils through the flooded intersection below. SFX: rain roar, vertical surge, ominous note. 00:13.2: Continue into a full 360 orbit around the serpentine abyssal titan and the masked figure high above the crossing. Keep the city spinning below them while the titan's body coils through the black street and the ascent holds steady. SFX: rain hiss, deep resonance, distant horns. EXCLUDE: Avoid drifting facial identity, cartoon liquid physics, unreadable lane continuity, text overlays, and camera HUD.

prompts.display_text: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white blouse, a flowing burgundy skirt, and white sneakers, stands on the edge of a high rooftop at night, looking out over a glowing modern city. A shadowy figure suddenly rushes in from behind and violently pushes her off the edge. Her expression turns from confusion to shock as she begins to fall. The camera follows her in a dramatic wide-angle frontal tracking shot as she drops between towering neon skyscrapers, with intense motion blur, spinning perspective, and cinematic speed. As she keeps falling, the real city seamlessly transforms into a surreal dreamlike dimension: a tunnel of colossal stone faces and metallic sculptures, floating cathedrals and shattered monuments in the clouds, giant marble statues, swirling red fabric, a deep blue vortex of water and feathers, enormous carnival masks and theatrical faces, abstract glowing ribbons and floating orbs, and a mystical geometric tunnel made of glowing runes, sigils, and burning celestial spheres. At the climax, fiery golden rings and massive spinning artifacts surround her as she reaches out in panic. Suddenly she crashes back into reality on a crowded daytime city street, stumbling forward, breathing hard, and staring directly into the camera in disbelief. surreal urban fantasy, cinematic CGI, seamless transitions, strong emotional storytelling, Hollywood trailer energy, intense falling sequence, epic atmosphere, ultra detailed, volumetric lighting, 8k cinematic

prompts.display_text: Shot on ALEXA 65mm anamorphic lens. Photorealistic cinematic quality. Aspect ratio 2.39:1 widescreen. Teal shadows, warm amber highlights. Film grain. Rain-soaked New York street at night. Neon signs, streetlights reflecting on wet asphalt. Steam rising from manholes. Lens flares, motion blur. Dolby Vision HDR. 0.0s–2.5s: Extreme low-angle tracking shot — a lone female fighter strides down a narrow NYC street, rain pouring heavily. Leather jacket soaked, hair slicked back and dripping. Heels echo faintly on wet pavement. Camera tracks backward with subtle shake. Yellow taxi lights streak across puddles. Figures step out from alleyways and fire escapes, slowly surrounding her. She tilts her head, cracks her knuckles — calm, fearless expression. 2.6s–5.0s: Whip-pan — first attacker lunges. TIME REMAP: slow-motion as she pivots smoothly, dodging and delivering a sharp elbow strike. Water sprays on impact. Her jacket snaps with the motion. Another attacker crashes into a stack of trash bags and metal bins. Sparks flicker from a flickering streetlight overhead. 5.1s–7.5s: Drone shot — overhead view as she moves fluidly through multiple opponents. SLOW MOTION: precise kicks and spins land cleanly, bodies sliding across rain-slick asphalt. Steam swirls under golden streetlights. One attacker swings a bat — she catches it mid-swing, twists, and disarms them effortlessly. 7.6s–10.0s: 360° orbital shot — she leaps into a spinning kick, taking down two attackers at once. Camera circles her as another rushes from behind. Without turning, she blocks and counters instantly. Breath visible in the cold night air. Each strike hits in sync with a rising cinematic score. 10.1s–13.0s: First-person POV — the final opponent charges. SMASH CUT: rapid, close-range exchange in slow motion. Her final punch lands clean. Silence falls. Rain continues to pour. Slow push-in — she stands alone in the empty street, adjusts her jacket sleeve, exhales steadily. Low-angle shot. Eyes locked forward. Unshaken.

Prompt:

Shot on ALEXA 65mm anamorphic lens. Photorealistic cinematic quality. Aspect ratio 2.39:1 widescreen. Teal shadows, warm amber highlights. Film grain. Rain-soaked New York street at night. Neon signs, streetlights reflecting on wet asphalt. Steam rising from manholes. Lens flares, motion blur. Dolby Vision HDR.

0.0s–2.5s:
Extreme low-angle tracking shot — a lone female fighter strides down a narrow NYC street, rain pouring heavily. Leather jacket soaked, hair slicked back and dripping. Heels echo faintly on wet pavement. Camera tracks backward with subtle shake. Yellow taxi lights streak across puddles. Figures step out from alleyways and fire escapes, slowly surrounding her. She tilts her head, cracks her knuckles — calm, fearless expression.

2.6s–5.0s:
Whip-pan — first attacker lunges. TIME REMAP: slow-motion as she pivots smoothly, dodging and delivering a sharp elbow strike. Water sprays on impact. Her jacket snaps with the motion. Another attacker crashes into a stack of trash bags and metal bins. Sparks flicker from a flickering streetlight overhead.

5.1s–7.5s:
Drone shot — overhead view as she moves fluidly through multiple opponents. SLOW MOTION: precise kicks and spins land cleanly, bodies sliding across rain-slick asphalt. Steam swirls under golden streetlights. One attacker swings a bat — she catches it mid-swing, twists, and disarms them effortlessly.

7.6s–10.0s:
360° orbital shot — she leaps into a spinning kick, taking down two attackers at once. Camera circles her as another rushes from behind. Without turning, she blocks and counters instantly. Breath visible in the cold night air. Each strike hits in sync with a rising cinematic score.

10.1s–13.0s:
First-person POV — the final opponent charges. SMASH CUT: rapid, close-range exchange in slow motion. Her final punch lands clean. Silence falls. Rain continues to pour.

Slow push-in — she stands alone in the empty street, adjusts her jacket sleeve, exhales steadily.

Low-angle shot. Eyes locked forward. Unshaken.

prompts.display_text: INFINITE FALL — Beer Catch [image1] Guy: lean young man, wavy blonde hair, thin glasses, black short-sleeve open shirt, dark grey pinstripe wide-leg trousers, large silver belt buckle, brown leather loafers, arm tattoos, silver bracelets. Expression: not panicked — annoyed at the bottle, nothing more. IMAX 65mm aggressive handheld — camera itself in freefall with him, shaking slightly with air resistance, never still. Fast orbital cuts, whip pans between angles, camera sometimes rushing past him at speed. Everything blown violently upward: hair, jacket, trouser legs, shirt — continuous strong upward wind throughout. The visual grammar of terminal velocity. Sound FX: constant roaring wind, fabric snapping, bottle tumbling, liquid sloshing. Environment: pure white infinite void — no ground, no ceiling, no horizon. Just white in all directions. A brown glass beer bottle tumbling slowly in freefall beside him, liquid sloshing inside, just out of reach. negative: no ground, no slow camera, no calm floating — this is a violent fall The entire sequence is one continuous fall at full speed. Camera whips around him — bug's eye from directly below looking up at him shrinking then rushing toward camera, overhead looking straight down at him, 10mm close pass inches from his face with the wind tearing at his hair and glasses, Dutch angle tracking his full body as he reaches. The bottle tumbles just past his fingers — he repositions fast, body rotating in the fall, reaching again. His glasses nearly torn off by the wind, he pushes them back with one hand without stopping reaching with the other. The fall feels violent and fast — not peaceful zero gravity, not serene floating. The roaring wind is constant and loud. His clothes are being destroyed by the air resistance — shirt billowing completely open, trouser legs flattened against his legs then snapping outward. He finally grabs the bottle in one hard grip — fingers closing around the neck. He pulls it against the wind to his lips. Takes a long defiant sip. Wind still roaring. Hair still destroyed. Glasses still crooked. Camera does one final fast orbit around him — close, aggressive, whipping past. He lowers the bottle. Looks directly into the camera lens from centimeters away. Completely unbothered. Wind roar continues. Cut to black. IMAX/anamorphic, violent freefall camera, aggressive orbital handheld, constant roaring wind, infinite white void, 4K Music: Flex It - MPH, y3kfae

prompts.display_text: FORMAT: 15s / 148 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D action-comedy / Pixar-Kung Fu Hustle homage SUBJECTS: Young man, torn t-shirt. Girlfriend, floral dress. Boss, black suit. Blockers: Landlady in nightgown, Tailor, Mahjong duo, Coolie porter, Landlord in pajamas. Pixar-proportioned: rubbery limbs, wire-fu physics. PROPS: Rainbow lollipop, silver hatchet, red slipper, cigarette, brass forearm rings, mahjong tiles, wooden pole. ENVIRONMENT: 1930s walled tenement block: dusty courtyard, tight corridors, cascading balconies. Laundry lines, hanging signs. Dusty golden light. MOOD: Wire-fu comedic mayhem. Impossible physics, deadpan reactions. COLOR LOGIC: Golden Hour Look CAMERA: One uninterrupted Steadicam event. Tracks the young man continuously, pulling back as he runs, swinging to frame each blocker without cutting. 24mm spherical lens. SCENE: 1. Steadicam starts MCU. Young man hands girlfriend the lollipop. 2. Boss steps in raising the hatchet. Young man leaps ten feet backward. Camera pulls back fast into the alley to lead his sprint. 3. Landlady steps in, swinging a red slipper in a blurry tornado of strikes. Young man slides under the swings on both knees. The wind force of her slaps blasts the Boss backward. 4. Camera tracks backward into a corridor. Tailor blocks, brass rings clinking. Young man deflects rapid punches, spinning the Tailor into a pillar as camera glides past. 5. Mahjong duo attacks with synchronized rapid-fire palm strikes. Young man parries both simultaneously using the back of his hands, then does a wire-fu backflip twenty feet up. Camera tilts up as they crash into their tile table. 6. Camera levels on a balcony. Coolie thrusts a wooden pole like a spear. Slow motion: Young man deflects the tip with a single knuckle. Normal speed: he spins the pole away, plants it, and pole-vaults over the roof. 7. Camera tracks him landing on a vertical brick wall. Three thugs launch flying kicks. Young man runs horizontally along the wall, blocking their kicks with rapid shin-blocks in mid-air. 8. Camera drops to floor level. Boss charges, swinging a wild hatchet combo. Young man side-steps, traps the wrist, steps directly onto the falling blade, and leaps off the Boss's head. 9. Camera pulls back through the gate. Landlord attacks with heavy tai-chi pushes. Young man engages in a lightning-fast sticky-hands exchange, redirecting the Landlord's momentum to spin him away before running past. 10. Camera stops EWS on open street. Boss and thugs crash into the Landlady in a dust cloud. Girlfriend waves the lollipop from a window. He waves back, running away. SFX: Acoustic guitar opens. Slipper slaps beat 3, brass clink 4, rapid palm smacks and tile crash 5, slow-mo whoosh and wood clack 6, fast wall steps and kick thuds 7, metallic ping 8, heavy clothing swoosh 9, massive dust boom 10 with guitar reprise.

prompts.display_text: cinematic horror. Jakarta KRL Commuter Line station at night, Sudirman station platform, harsh yellow-white fluorescent overhead lighting, worn dirty tiled floor, blue KRL train car parked at platform, Indonesian signage on walls. A young woman in [reference outfit] poses next to the train car taking a selfie, smiling. On the train wall behind her, a large advertisement poster shows a beautiful woman's face. The poster surface begins to ripple and crack. Long black wet hair pushes through the glossy paper. A pale hand with black fingernails tears through. A kuntilanak in torn white kebaya crawls out of the poster completely, feet never touching the ground, long hair covering her face, head tilted at an unnatural angle. Bystanders on the platform scream and scatter. The woman drops her phone and runs. POV handheld tracking shot, she sprints through the platform, quick glance back, the kuntilanak glides at impossible speed closing the distance, hair flowing, white kebaya tattered. Emergency lights flicker red. Train doors slam shut. Dead end. Wide shot the woman presses her back against the closed train doors, nowhere to go. The kuntilanak stops. Slowly raises her head. Two hollow black eyes beneath the hair. Shaky handheld cam, motion blur, high contrast shadows, horror aesthetic, cinematic.

prompts.display_text: Formula” Most people write vibes. Seedance wants structure. Use this every time: Subject → Action → Camera → Style If you skip camera → you get random motion If you skip action → you get stiff clips 2. The “Camera is King” rule Seedance is basically a camera simulator. Instead of: “girl walking in city” Say: “tracking shot, slow dolly-in, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field” That alone upgrades output quality massively 3. The “Don’t Describe the Image” hack If you’re using a reference image: DO NOT re-describe it Only describe motion + changes Otherwise the model “reinterprets” your image and ruins it 4. The “Motion Intensity” trick Seedance doesn’t infer speed. “car drives” = boring “car accelerates aggressively, motion blur, tires screeching” = cinematic You have to explicitly define energy levels

Spent 24 hours stress-testing Seedance 2.0 so that you don't have to 

The difference between “AI slop” and “this looks directed” is literally 2–3 prompt changes.

Seedance 2 Global access api :-

github.com/Anil-matcha/Se
edance-2.0-API
…


https://
muapi.ai/playground/see
dance-v2.0-i2v
…

If you are just looking for an app to run Seedance 2 without business email and geo restrictions check out VadooAI

The “4-Part Prompt Formula” 

Most people write vibes. Seedance wants structure.

Use this every time:

Subject → Action → Camera → Style

If you skip camera → you get random motion

If you skip action → you get stiff clips

2. The “Camera is King” rule 

Seedance is basically a camera simulator.

Instead of: “girl walking in city”

Say: “tracking shot, slow dolly-in, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field”

That alone upgrades output quality massively

3. The “Don’t Describe the Image” hack 

If you’re using a reference image:

DO NOT re-describe it

Only describe motion + changes

Otherwise the model “reinterprets” your image and ruins it

4. The “Motion Intensity” trick 

Seedance doesn’t infer speed.

“car drives” = boring

“car accelerates aggressively, motion blur, tires screeching” = cinematic

You have to explicitly define energy levels
prompts.text: Spent 24 hours stress-testing Seedance 2.0 so that you don't have to The difference between “AI slop” and “this looks directed” is literally 2–3 prompt changes. Seedance 2 Global access api :- https:// github.com/Anil-matcha/Se edance-2.0-API ... https:// muapi.ai/playground/see dance-v2.0-i2v ... If you are just looking for an app to run Seedance 2 without business email and geo restrictions check out VadooAI The “4-Part Prompt Formula” Most people write vibes. Seedance wants structure. Use this every time: Subject → Action → Camera → Style If you skip camera → you get random motion If you skip action → you get stiff clips 2. The “Camera is King” rule Seedance is basically a camera simulator. Instead of: “girl walking in city” Say: “tracking shot, slow dolly-in, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field” That alone upgrades output quality massively 3. The “Don’t Describe the Image” hack If you’re using a reference image: DO NOT re-describe it Only describe motion + changes Otherwise the model “reinterprets” your image and ruins it 4. The “Motion Intensity” trick Seedance doesn’t infer speed. “car drives” = boring “car accelerates aggressively, motion blur, tires screeching” = cinematic You have to explicitly define energy levels
