prompts.display_text: [CINEMATIC SETUP] Style: Professional 4K TV Sports Broadcast footage, handheld ringside camera mixed with wide crane shots. Lens/Aperture: 35mm broadcast lens, deep depth of field to keep the crowd in view. Color Grade: High-contrast, saturated "Main Event" lighting with vibrant blues and reds. Atmosphere: Volumetric haze, strobe light flashes from the crowd, realistic arena sweat and skin texture. Audio: Immersive spatial sound, roaring stadium crowd, thudding ring canvas impacts, heavy metallic chair "clang" SFX. [CHARACTERS] Wrestler 1: Athletic, lean high-flyer in neon green trunks and wristbands. Wrestler 2: Heavyweight powerhouse, tall with long wet hair, wearing black leather tights. The Behemoth: A colossal, morbidly obese giant in a stretched leopard-print singlet.The Official: Standard referee in a black-and-white striped shirt and black slacks. [TIMELINE SECOND BY SECOND] 0-3s: [Medium Tracking Shot] Wrestler 1 sprints toward the ring ropes, bounces off the tensioned cables with realistic physics, and accelerates back toward the center. 3-6s: [Dynamic Low-Angle] Wrestler 2 stands his ground and executes a massive lariat clothesline; Wrestler 1 flips backward from the impact and hits the canvas hard with a visible ripple effect on the ring floor. 6-11s: [Wide Crane Shot] Both wrestlers lie dazed. A massive 500lb Behemoth climbs the turnbuckle. He pauses, then performs a giant splash, landing body-first onto both men. The ring frame shakes violently upon impact. 11-15s: [Tight Close-up] The referee suddenly grabs a cold-rolled steel chair. In a shocking heel-turn, he swings the chair overhead, smashing it against the Behemoth’s skull. Metallic impact sparks and "CLANG" spatial audio. [STYLE & QUALITY BOOSTERS] Photorealistic 8K, ultra-detailed skin textures and sweat, cinematic stadium lighting, perfect motion blur, high dynamic range, no artifacts, coherent multi-subject physics.

prompts.display_text: A massive coastal battlefield where ocean, land, and sky collide. Three colossal creatures engage: — a sky dragon with metallic scales and storm wings — a fire colossus emerging from volcanic fissures — a giant ocean leviathan rising from the sea Opening frame: wide shot of coastline — ocean churning, volcano erupting, storm clouds gathering overhead. Hook at second two: all three creatures attack simultaneously. The battlefield fractures into elemental chaos: — the dragon generates hurricane-force winds and lightning — the fire colossus erupts lava and shockwaves — the leviathan summons massive tidal surges The city between them collapses under combined forces — water floods streets, fire ignites structures, wind tears apart buildings. Camera sweeps between the three titans, snap zooming into collisions — fire meeting water in explosive steam clouds, lightning striking molten terrain. Color logic: deep ocean blue, molten orange-red, storm gray and electric white. Escalation builds as all three forces collide at the same point, destabilizing the entire coastline. Final beat: hard POV shift — camera becomes the wave-fire-storm collision itself, rushing forward as all elements merge into a single catastrophic blast. Massive environmental destruction, multi-element physics interaction, cinematic scale, 4K ultra-detail.

prompts.display_text: used in Seedance 2.0 FORMAT: 15s / MULTI-CUT / 5 BEATS / VIRAL EMOTIONAL TWIST SUBJECTS: A small robot the size of a shoebox, boxy body made of dented brushed aluminum with visible rivets and scratches, one flickering blue LED eye (left) and one steady warm orange LED eye (right), two stubby telescoping arms with three-pronged claw hands, and tank treads that squeak when moving. Its chest panel has a cracked circular speaker grille. It moves with jerky stop-start motions and tilts its whole body to express emotion. A single wilted daisy in a cracked terra cotta pot — this is the visual anchor throughout. Stylized 3D quality animation with tactile material rendering, squash-and-stretch on the robot's body, and exaggerated emotional eye animation. ENVIRONMENT: An abandoned rooftop greenhouse at golden hour. Shattered glass panels let warm sunset light pour in at low angles. Overgrown dead vines cover rusted metal shelving. Cracked concrete floor with patches of dry soil. One corner has a small puddle of collected rainwater reflecting the orange sky. Dust motes and tiny pollen particles float in the light beams. The city skyline is visible through broken glass — distant but soft, out of focus. STYLE: Stylized 3D animation, subsurface rendering on organic matter, physically accurate metal wear on the robot. Warm desaturated palette — dusty oranges, faded greens, soft rust tones. Cinematic depth of field with golden hour lens flares. Gentle film grain. MOOD: Lonely tenderness building to quiet joy. Bittersweet but ultimately hopeful. COLOR LOGIC: Sunset Rust — warm amber light, cool blue-grey shadows, pops of green only at the very end. ⸻ 0:00–0:02 · The Discovery Wide shot, 35mm, low angle from floor level. The greenhouse is still, bathed in golden light. The tiny robot rolls in through a gap in the broken glass wall, treads squeaking. It stops. Its mismatched eyes scan the space — the blue one flickers nervously. It spots something offscreen. Cut to insert close-up, 85mm: the wilted daisy in its cracked pot, sitting alone on a shelf in a beam of light. One brown petal falls. SFX: tread squeak, servo whir, gentle wind through broken glass, petal tap on concrete. 0:02–0:05 · The Attempt Medium shot, 50mm. The robot rolls to the shelf and extends one arm toward the pot. Too short. It stretches — whole body tilting forward on its treads, arm telescoping to maximum with a strained ratcheting sound. Fingertips barely touch the pot. It nudges the pot off the shelf and catches it with both claws in a clumsy fumble — nearly drops it, recovers, hugs it tight against its chest panel. Its orange eye glows slightly brighter. SFX: ratchet extension, ceramic scrape, fumble clatter, catch clank, relieved servo sigh. 0:05–0:08 · The Problem Close-up, 85mm, on the daisy. It is completely wilted — drooping, brown, dry. The robot tilts its body sideways examining it. It pokes one petal with a claw tip. The petal crumbles to dust. The robot recoils. Its blue eye flickers faster — distressed. It looks around the greenhouse frantically, body swiveling left and right. Then it spots the puddle of rainwater in the corner. Both eyes lock on it. SFX: petal crumble, distressed beep sequence, servo whip-pan, hopeful double chirp. 0:08–0:12 · The Gift Medium tracking shot, 35mm, following the robot as it rolls carefully toward the puddle, pot clutched tight. It arrives at the edge. Problem: it has no way to scoop water. One beat of stillness. Then it tilts the entire pot and dips the dry soil directly into the shallow puddle — gentle, slow, deliberate. Water seeps into the cracked terra cotta. The robot holds it there. Sunset light catches the water surface, throwing rippled golden reflections across the robot's dented body. Its speaker grille crackles and emits a faint broken hum — it is trying to sing. SFX: water absorption, gentle ripple, crackling hum melody attempt, distant wind. 0:12–0:15 · The Bloom Close-up, 85mm. The robot lifts the pot from the water and holds it at eye level. Nothing happens. One still beat. Then — a single green leaf unfurls from the stem, small and bright against all the brown. The robot's blue eye stops flickering and holds steady for the first time. Both eyes glow warm together. It pulls the pot closer to its chest. Camera slowly pulls back to a wide shot, 35mm. The tiny robot sits alone in the vast greenhouse, sunset light wrapping around it, holding one small pot with one new leaf. SFX: leaf unfurl whisper, both eyes hum in harmony, warm music swell, golden hour silence.

prompts.display_text: I'm leaving you the prompt I used so you can copy it as a base and ask any AI to adapt it to your vehicle and environment ---- Title / Concept “CIVIC TYPE R — DOMINION IN EVERY CURVE” — a 15s high-performance commercial where the car conquers a dramatic mountain road, blending precision engineering with raw driving emotion. STYLE / VISUAL AESTHETIC Cinematic automotive realism, mountain lighting like [attached road image] , high contrast tones, glossy red paint reflecting landscape, motion blur, dynamic environment, premium commercial finish. SUBJECTS Red Honda Civic Type R — aggressive stance, black aerodynamic details, rear wing, triple exhaust, sharp LED headlights, performance wheels gripping asphalt. ENVIRONMENT Winding mountain road with guardrails, dense pine forests, towering rocky peaks in the background, golden sunlight cutting through clouds, sense of altitude and open space. MOOD / INTENT Adrenaline, control, freedom, precision under pressure. The car feels planted, alive, engineered for curves and speed. CAMERA / CINEMATOGRAPHY Dynamic tracking shots, low-angle chase cams, drone sweeps, wheel-level motion shots, fast push-ins, lateral tracking with background blur, crisp subject isolation, cinematic motion blur at speed. TIMELINE 0.0s–2.0s Wide aerial shot of a winding mountain road at golden hour. The red Civic appears in the distance, cutting through curves. Text: “CONTROL STARTS HERE”. 2.0s–4.0s Low front tracking shot. The car charges forward, headlights sharp. Road lines streak beneath. Mountains reflect across the hood. 4.0s–6.0s Side chase shot. The Civic takes a tight curve with precision. Wheels grip aggressively, slight body roll controlled. Background blurs into speed. 6.0s–8.5s Rear three-quarter shot. The spoiler slices the air. Triple exhaust centered. Subtle heat distortion. Text: “BUILT FOR THE CURVES”. 8.5s–11.0s Rapid montage: close-up wheel spinning, brake calipers clamping, steering input, suspension compression over asphalt. Each cut synced to deep bass hits. 11.0s–13.0s Drone orbit as the car exits a curve into a straight. Sunlight hits the red paint dramatically. The car accelerates into open road. 13.0s–15.0s Front hero shot as the car approaches camera and slows slightly. Final text: “HONDA CIVIC TYPE R”. Subline: “IT DOESN’T FOLLOW THE ROAD. IT DOMINATES IT.” End on engine echo fading into the mountains. GLOBAL KEYWORDS automotive commercial, mountain road, Honda Civic Type R, dynamic driving, cinematic car ad, performance, curves, speed, control, golden hour

prompts.display_text: A 42-year-old Tibetan monk with shaved head and deep-set eyes, wearing layered charcoal robes threaded with faint gravitational lattice patterns, skin marked with subtle fractal scars that pulse with dim violet light — opening frame is a medium close-up of him seated in lotus position on a levitating stone disk above a vast canyon, fragments of rock orbiting slowly around him in silent suspension under a starless sky. His right hand rotates slowly and the surrounding debris begins accelerating, forming a visible gravity well — at second two the ground below implodes inward as the canyon floor collapses into a spiraling sinkhole, triggering a rapid dolly zoom outward revealing entire mountain ridges bending toward his position. He never stands: the right hand amplifies gravitational pull, pulling structures inward; the left hand inverts local gravity fields, sending boulders and enemies upward into suspended orbit. Dynamic orbit camera circles him as debris fields form layered rings around his body, snap zooming into his hands during each gravity surge, snap cutting to collapsing terrain as impact confirmation. Deep violet fills the core frame, while black void distortion consumes the outer edges — lensing effects bending light around him. Escalation builds through increasing mass displacement until a floating fortress is pulled from the horizon and crushed inward. Final beat: hard POV shift — camera becomes the collapsing gravity field itself, spiraling downward through airborne debris into the canyon core as everything converges into a singular point. Gravitational lensing distorts all edges of frame; dust and stone fragments stretch under compression; subtle starfield flicker appears in void zones. Epic cosmic realism, ultra-detailed debris physics, volumetric dust collapse, 4K ultra-detail.

prompts.display_text: 0-3s · Otherworldly Inscription Low-angle upward shot. The void entity's right hand embeds into the altar, dark veins in fractal geometry patterns wildly parasitizing across the stone slab. Fissures erupt with viscous flesh tendrils, the ground pulsating dramatically like lungs. Background sect ancient architecture undergoes visual horizontal displacement tremors. 3-6s · Ossified Mutation Circling ascending/descending shot. The entity's spine explodes and twists in a chain reaction, obsidian horn crown piercing out from deep within the skull. Both arms entwined with liquid black smoke, generating high-temperature electric arcs in the air along its path, suspended lanterns instantly bursting in a visually collapsing overload. 6-9s · Material Deconstruction Pull-back shot. The entity's epidermis displays porcelain-like cracking textures, revealing a writhing dark matter core inside. Fingertips mutate into half-meter-long shadow blades, instantly triggering accelerated decay upon touching wooden pillars, the architectural structure dissolving into rising black smoke. 9-12s · Shadow Tide Devouring High-altitude overhead shot. The entity raises its arm, darkness behind it collapsing then erupting violently, forming a kilometer-scale black-red corrupted tsunami. The shadow flood ravages everything in its path—bluestone pavement, stone lions, pavilions—all pixelated, torn apart, and devoured. 12-15s · Void Finale Facial close-up. In the background, the massive mountain gate twists and snaps like a hemp rope under black hole gravity toward the center. The entity approaches slowly in dead silence, its pupils containing a rotating void nebula. It stares into the lens, the frame generating intense film burning and signal glitch effects, ultimately fading into absolute darkness.

prompts.display_text: Playful high-stakes slapstick cinematic scene in an abandoned wooden warehouse with warm amber sunlight and cool industrial shadows. A mischievous ginger tabby cat wearing a tiny tactical harness performs a secret “spy mission” while suspended from a rope, holding a lit firecracker. Below him, a plump white chicken wearing a blue nightcap sleeps on grain sacks, snoring loudly. The cat theatrically drops the firecracker into the chicken’s nightcap. It explodes in a burst of purple smoke and flying feathers. The chicken is launched upward in exaggerated cartoon physics, then lands dazed, slowly turning toward camera with glowing red eyes in a dramatic cliffhanger. Style: cinematic comedy, Mission Impossible parody, ultra-detailed, volumetric lighting, dust particles, feather physics, squash-and-stretch animation, dynamic motion, 120 BPM orchestral slapstick score, high detail, 4K, film-quality rendering.

prompts.display_text: Scene 1: A cracked empty street near a foggy shoreline. A woman in a long grey coat walks slowly toward the camera. Beside her floats a giant fragmented human face made of broken buildings and concrete, subtly shifting as if alive. Dust particles drift in the air. Scene 2: Cut to a tired child leaning against a broken wall indoors, eyes half-closed, exhausted. In the blurred background, another child sits silently. The atmosphere feels heavy, abandoned, and hopeless. Scene 3: A stern middle-aged man in a grey overcoat stands in a ruined European-style street beside an old rusty car. The camera slowly pushes in as he looks ahead with a hardened expression. Scene 4: Close-up of a woman’s face partially merged with mechanical and architectural fragments. Orange butterflies flutter around her head in slow motion, symbolizing fragile hope. Scene 5: A crowded street under a massive curved wall embedded with small structures and windows. People walk aimlessly, heads down, creating a sense of routine and oppression. Scene 6: A street musician with messy hair plays a guitar into a vintage microphone. Behind him stands a silent crowd. A rusted tram looms in the background. Light rain begins to fall. Scene 7: A line of children in worn vintage clothing stands still, staring directly into the camera. Their expressions are blank, almost haunting. Slow dolly movement forward. Scene 8: A surreal couple walks together. The woman carries a house-like structure on her head, with her face visible through a small window. The man beside her is partially covered in dark soot. They walk through rubble in silence. Scene 9 (Final): A woman sits in a cluttered room filled with old radios and clocks. A sign reading “MORE” hangs behind her. She slowly turns a knob on a vintage radio as static fills the air. Fade to black. Style & Motion Keywords cinematic, dystopian, surreal realism, slow motion, dramatic lighting, volumetric fog, depth of field, 35mm film look, desaturated tones, symbolic storytelling, melancholic mood, smooth camera movement

prompts.display_text: A cinematic concert gacha reveal in portrait orientation. Phase 1 (2s): Dark arena with scattered blue-white penlight dots. Vertical Japanese text of the character's catchphrase reveals rapidly character-by-character with soft glow. Camera orbits above the audience. Phase 2 (2.5s): Camera swings toward the stage. 8-10 vertical spotlight beams descend from trusses. Steady zoom in reveals spherical footlights along the stage edge. A rainbow-colored ring burst explodes at center with multicolored star-shaped particles scattering outward. Phase 3 (3.5s): Stage reappears with an elaborate gothic arch structure. Penlights multiply into a vibrant rainbow sea below. On the large screen behind the stage, a character silhouette slowly materializes. Camera creeps closer. The glow intensifies into a massive four-pointed star flash, then instant cut to total black. Phase 4 (3s): A blinding white flash erupts. The stage returns dramatically upgraded — golden fireworks shoot upward from both sides of the arch, backdrop transforms into stained-glass geometric patterns in pink, purple, blue and gold. The character materializes from silhouette to full color on center stage. Crossing laser beams sweep from the sides. Phase 5 (4s): Screen floods white, resolves into a close-up dolly sweeping right-to-left past colorful spotlights with dense rainbow penlights waving below. Camera pulls back to center revealing the full arena — arch stage, stained glass screen, character center, thousands of rainbow penlights. Final frame: character illustration in a decorative frame.

prompts.display_text: 15-second cinematic video, ultra-smooth camera, natural focus pulls, warm-to-cool color shift, photorealistic 8K, ARRI Alexa look. Macro close-up of a Michelin-style salmon rose—glossy, orange-pink layers. Knife makes a slow precise slice, oils shimmer (0–3s). Focus pulls to a calm young man in side profile as he lifts a bite (3–5s). Extreme close-up bite—slow chew, eyes soften, subtle smile (5–7s). Fast push into his eye—reflection blooms into light, scene dissolves (7–8s). Underwater world: wide shot, sun rays through turquoise water, corals, seaweed, schools of salmon swimming. Man floats weightlessly, watching fish in calm wonder. Slow orbit, light beams shifting (8–13s). Match cut back to restaurant—same angle, he swallows, smiles, continues eating (13–15s). SFX: knife slice, soft chew, restaurant ambiance fading into underwater sounds and back. No text overlays.

prompts.display_text: FORMAT: 15s / 150 BPM / 8 shots / compact action duel loop SUBJECTS: One occult fighter and one curse-like creature, both drawn as 2.5D line-art characters with visible contour lines, interior sketch lines and light hatching, never solid black fill, one body each in every beat. SCENE: Black and white 3D sketch-anime combat inside a minimal sketch ruin on white paper. Keep clear 2.5D line-art characters with contour lines, interior construction strokes and light hatching, not black silhouette bodies. Start on direct impact, not entry, with both characters already in mid-exchange at center frame. Use aggressive cinematic framing, hard impact punctuation, sharp micro-pauses, strong anticipation and forceful follow-through while preserving left-right continuity and readable strike lanes. The creature uses short curse bursts, limb warping and ink shockwaves. Build the action as a seamless loop so the final rush reconnects directly into the opening clash. The space has floor, broken wall planes and depth, and only redraws on hits, surges or skids. MOOD: Occult pressure, supernatural force, hard cinematic impact, seamless loop energy. COLOR LOGIC: Monochromatic Grading STYLE: 3D hand-drawn sketch anime with 2.5D line-art characters, bold cinematic action framing and readable curse-battle choreography TIMELINE: 1. Smash cut, low 24mm impact track, open on direct mid-clash at center frame as fighter's short strike and creature's forearm collide, lines splinter outward, both bodies compress then snap past each other without stopping, SFX: impact snap, brush tear. 2. Hard cut, 35mm handheld push, fighter pivots out of the pass, shoulder-feints and lands a short body strike under guard, both recoil half a step with visible force transfer, SFX: air slice, ink thud. 3. Whip pan, 50mm side track, creature whips a warped forearm across a clear lane and sheds a short ink shockwave, fighter slips under both by inches, SFX: heavy whoosh, brush tear, ink flare. 4. Smash cut, 28mm close pursuit, micro-pause, fighter plants, twists through the hips and drives a compact rib counter, impact distortion spikes and the camera kicks with contact, SFX: crack hit, ink burst. 5. Match cut, 40mm rear three-quarter, creature skids backward as floor and wall lines redraw under the impact path, SFX: scrape, paper rip, low ink pulse. 6. Hard cut, 32mm handheld orbit, creature slams back in with one arm warping longer, fighter gives ground, parries high and pivots across the axis to keep continuity, SFX: double hit, sharp breath, tendon stretch. 7. Whip pan, 65mm impact close-up, fighter coils low, holds one sharp micro-pause, then releases a decisive upward strike, recoil whips through both bodies and the frame blows out white for a beat, SFX: deep crack, white flash burst. 8. Hard cut, 24mm wide pursuit frame, creature regathers, fires a short chest-level curse burst and surges back to center as fighter rebounds into the same opposing rush geometry as beat 1, SFX: trailing crack, paper hiss, ink burst, rushing foot drag.

prompts.display_text: Overarching Concept: Continuous character journey, moving from gritty Y2K streetwear on a dark rooftop to a stylized, high-tech "tech-ninja" aesthetic inside a pristine white iOS interface dimension. Fast-paced, fluid, and highly interactive with the camera. Universal Rule: The same red-haired woman from Scene 1 must appear in all subsequent scenes, ensuring perfect visual continuity. Scene 1 (00:00–00:01): Rooftop Throw Location: Windy urban rooftop at night, glowing city skyline. Wardrobe (Character 1): Y2K style — baggy vintage denim jacket, graphic baby tee, wide-leg parachute pants. Character Continuity: A specific red-haired woman with wavy copper hair. Action & Camera: Static camera. The red-haired woman spins rapidly, her loose clothes catching the wind. Mid-spin, she throws an iPhone 17 Pro Max directly into the camera lens. Scene 2 (00:01–00:02): Giant Phone Spin Location: Blurred night city backdrop. Action & Camera: Focus pulls to the giant, spinning iPhone 17 Pro Max in the foreground. It stops spinning, hovering vertically and centered. Scene 3 (00:02–00:07): The "Twist & Pull" Transition (CRITICAL FOCUS — NO GLASS BREAKING) Location: Still on the night rooftop, phone centered. Character Continuity: The same red-haired woman (from Scene 1) is visible inside the glowing white phone screen, smiling confidently. Wardrobe (Character 2): A tight, form-fitting, cropped matte-black leather motorcycle jacket over a white top. Action (The Twist): Her hand smoothly emerges from the screen into 3D space (the screen acts like a fluid boundary — no glass breaking). She reaches toward the camera and performs a twisting motion with her wrist and fingers — exactly like screwing in a lightbulb or turning a dial. Camera (Max Zoom): As she twists, the camera zooms in maximally on her hand. Action (The Pull): She reverses the twisting motion and rapidly retracts her hand back into the phone. Camera (The Dive): This reverse motion acts as a physical "pull." As she yanks her hand back, she pulls the camera with her — the camera flies rapidly into the phone screen, fully entering the digital interface. Scene 4 (00:07–00:14): UI Dimension & The Final Punchline Location: Bright, infinite white 3D space. Character Continuity: The same red-haired woman stands center, smiling confidently. Wardrobe (Character 3 — "Tech-Ninja"): Full matte-black tactical jumpsuit in technical fabric; asymmetrical layered vest with utility straps; multi-strap chest harness with glowing magnetic buckles; full gloves with integrated digital displays; chunky combat platform boots. Interface Elements: Gigantic simplified floating 3D app icons — Instagram camera, TikTok "d", Snapchat ghost — swirling around her. The Finale: She looks directly at the camera, playfully catches a glowing "Like" (Heart) icon from the air, gives a sharp wink, and throws the icon straight into the camera lens. The icon covers the lens, turning the screen instantly to black — creating a definitive ending or a seamless loop back to the start.

prompts.tweet_text:
Today I'm working with Seedance 2.0 on 
@YouArtStudio
  Creating transitions of one character across three scenes. Prompt

You can recreate this effect with yourself as the star! Just copy my prompt, add a high-quality close-up photo of your face, and replace "red-haired woman" with a description of your own appearance. The prompt is very stable — I generated several versions and loved every single one.

PROMPT:
Overarching Concept: Continuous character journey, moving from gritty Y2K streetwear on a dark rooftop to a stylized, high-tech "tech-ninja" aesthetic inside a pristine white iOS interface dimension. Fast-paced, fluid, and highly interactive with the camera.

Universal Rule: The same red-haired woman from Scene 1 must appear in all subsequent scenes, ensuring perfect visual continuity.

Scene 1 (00:00–00:01): Rooftop Throw
Location: Windy urban rooftop at night, glowing city skyline.
Wardrobe (Character 1): Y2K style — baggy vintage denim jacket, graphic baby tee, wide-leg parachute pants.
Character Continuity: A specific red-haired woman with wavy copper hair.
Action & Camera: Static camera. The red-haired woman spins rapidly, her loose clothes catching the wind. Mid-spin, she throws an iPhone 17 Pro Max directly into the camera lens.
Scene 2 (00:01–00:02): Giant Phone Spin
Location: Blurred night city backdrop.
Action & Camera: Focus pulls to the giant, spinning iPhone 17 Pro Max in the foreground. It stops spinning, hovering vertically and centered.
Scene 3 (00:02–00:07): The "Twist & Pull" Transition (CRITICAL FOCUS — NO GLASS BREAKING)
Location: Still on the night rooftop, phone centered.
Character Continuity: The same red-haired woman (from Scene 1) is visible inside the glowing white phone screen, smiling confidently.
Wardrobe (Character 2): A tight, form-fitting, cropped matte-black leather motorcycle jacket over a white top.
Action (The Twist): Her hand smoothly emerges from the screen into 3D space (the screen acts like a fluid boundary — no glass breaking). She reaches toward the camera and performs a twisting motion with her wrist and fingers — exactly like screwing in a lightbulb or turning a dial.
Camera (Max Zoom): As she twists, the camera zooms in maximally on her hand.
Action (The Pull): She reverses the twisting motion and rapidly retracts her hand back into the phone.
Camera (The Dive): This reverse motion acts as a physical "pull." As she yanks her hand back, she pulls the camera with her — the camera flies rapidly into the phone screen, fully entering the digital interface.
Scene 4 (00:07–00:14): UI Dimension & The Final Punchline
Location: Bright, infinite white 3D space.
Character Continuity: The same red-haired woman stands center, smiling confidently.
Wardrobe (Character 3 — "Tech-Ninja"): Full matte-black tactical jumpsuit in technical fabric; asymmetrical layered vest with utility straps; multi-strap chest harness with glowing magnetic buckles; full gloves with integrated digital displays; chunky combat platform boots.
Interface Elements: Gigantic simplified floating 3D app icons — Instagram camera, TikTok "d", Snapchat ghost — swirling around her.
The Finale: She looks directly at the camera, playfully catches a glowing "Like" (Heart) icon from the air, gives a sharp wink, and throws the icon straight into the camera lens. The icon covers the lens, turning the screen instantly to black — creating a definitive ending or a seamless loop back to the start. 
#Seedance2

prompts.display_text: FORMAT: 15s / 182 BPM / 7 CUTS / minimalist 2D stick-fight animation, pure white background, ultra-fast readability SUBJECTS: Two 2D stick fighters drawn in solid black lines on a blank white field. One is lean, evasive, and elastic. The other is wider, heavier, and constantly presses forward with crushing force. ENVIRONMENT: Empty white void, no props. Only black speed lines, impact rings, smear frames, skid marks, and sharp red blood accents. Clean negative space keeps every move instantly readable. MOOD: Brutal, explosive, relentless, stylish, unfinished. COLOR LOGIC: Monochromatic Grading TIMELINE: 0:00-0:01 - Wide shot, extreme negative space. The lean fighter stands centered and still. The heavy fighter drops from above already throwing a downward strike. Sudden hard push-in. 24mm wide feel. SFX: air drop, hard land, cutting whoosh. 0:01-0:03 - CUT ON ACTION. Side wide shot. Heavy fighter unleashes jab, hook, knee. Lean fighter slips, guards, absorbs the knee, then fires back with calf kick, straight punch, spinning back kick. A sharp red blood arc snaps off the final hit. Short truck move. 35mm feel. SFX: swishes, dry thuds, foot taps, impact ticks. 0:03-0:05 - SMASH CUT. Medium wide side view. Heavy fighter answers with body hook, elbow, backfist, stomp kick, then drives through with a rushing shoulder check, forcing the lean fighter across frame. Quick red flecks burst near the impact rings. Fast lateral move with slight undercrank feel. SFX: impact cracks, whip swishes, stomp hit, air bursts. 0:05-0:07 - CUT ON ACTION. Side wide shot. Lean fighter ducks the next swing, steps inside, lands a rib shot, slicing elbow to the chin, then a rising kick to the chest. A brief red spray snaps off the last connection. Short truck move. 35mm film feel. SFX: duck swish, body thud, elbow crack, kick crack, skid scrape. 0:07-0:10 - WHIP PAN TRANSITION. Side wide shot. Both crash back together and trade a savage twelve-hit chain: punch, block, elbow, knee, duck, backfist, kick, catch, shove, hook, spinning elbow, straight cross. Red flicks burst only on the hardest impacts. Fast truck move with momentum-based cutting. Thick black impact circles on the heaviest blows. SFX: rapid hit flurry, hard swishes, bass ticks, breath bursts. 0:10-0:12 - CUT ON ACTION. Worm's-eye wide shot. Heavy fighter surges forward again. Lean fighter eats two hits, slips the third, steps off the planted thigh, vaults upward, and hammers down. Both collide midair in a tight X-shaped silhouette that splits apart instantly. Quick arc move around the clash. 24mm wide feel. SFX: rising whoosh, hit flurry, double crack, burst hiss, bass slam. 0:12-0:15 - HARD CUT. Monumental wide shot. Both land already in motion, skid a step, rebound, and charge back to center without pause, dissolving into black strike smears and red flecks as the exchange continues. Tiny push-in. End mid-fight, unresolved. 50mm standard feel. SFX: skid scrape, hard swishes, dry impacts, low ring.

prompts.display_text: **Environment:** A frozen glacial valley under pale arctic twilight. Deep cobalt shadows across the ice field with cold blue ambient light reflecting from massive glacier walls. Snow particles drifting through the air. Frozen lake surfaces acting as natural mirrors for diegetic reflections. **Action:** 15.0s sequence. A towering figure composed of crystalline ice and refracting light engages a magma-armored titan whose body glows through volcanic fissures beneath black stone plating. They clash in rapid close-range combat across the frozen lake. Each strike fractures the ice beneath them, sending radial cracks spreading outward. The magma titan’s punches melt sections of the glacier while the ice giant counters with explosive frost bursts that instantly freeze the molten rock. Velocity Ramp choreography: rapid exchanges freeze into ultra-slow motion when fists collide, showing ice crystals shattering and lava droplets vaporizing before snapping back to full speed as both titans slide across the ice surface. **Camera:** Low tracking shot sliding across the frozen lake surface, reflections capturing both combatants. A sudden upward crane move follows the moment the magma titan is thrown into a glacier wall, ice exploding outward. **Style & Constraints:** 8K resolution, photorealistic volumetric snow, ray-traced reflections on ice surfaces, cinematic cold lighting, 35mm film grain, stable geometry, no flicker.

Camera: aggressive tracking, whip pans, blade POV, high-speed motion, no slow motion. Action: 0–3s: Samurai stands surrounded → instant iaijutsu draw → dark energy slash cuts multiple enemies. 3–6s: High-speed dashes, shadow afterimages, rapid slashes, enemies fall, debris flying. 6–9s: Close combat, parries, teleport-like strikes, circular slashes clearing groups. 9–12s: Final spinning slash → massive dark wave → enemies freeze then collapse → silence, smoke fading.

prompts.display_text: [Style] Y2K Retro Pool Party, MiniDV Camcorder Texture (Camcorder Footage), Overexposed Warm Yellow, Film Grain, VHS Interference Lines, Fast-Paced Beat-Synced [Duration] 15 seconds [Scene] 2000s American Backyard Pool Party, Blazing Sun, Dazzling Water Ripples, Folding Lounge Chairs, Silver CD Player, Rainbow Inflatable Floats, Plastic Whale [Characters] A group of Y2K-styled girls: Low-Rise Bikinis, Belly Chains, Colorful Plastic Sunglasses, Butterfly Clips, Glitter Lip Gloss [00:00-00:01.5] Shot 1: Bursting Out of Water (Close-up / Pullback) DV Boot-Up Blue Screen Flashes with REC Red Dot. In-Your-Face Close-Up—A girl wearing colorful plastic sunglasses erupts from underwater, flinging wet hair to spray an arc of water (Slow-mo), water droplets splashing the lens, grinning wide at the DV as sunlight overexposes to pure white. [00:01.5-00:03] Shot 2: Poolside Stroll (Low Angle / Right Pan) Low-angle waist-high right pan, three girls in sheer cover-ups clutching canned drinks saunter across wet tiles, one snapping a selfie with a flip phone, chunky platform flip-flops slapping the ground. [00:03-00:04.5] Shot 3: Shoving into the Pool (Dutch Angle) Dutch angle medium shot, one girl shoves her bestie into the pool from behind, soda can flying out, body splashing in with a massive spray, the pusher doubled over laughing. [00:04.5-00:06] Shot 4: FPV Dive (FPV Drone Dive) FPV dives from above skimming the water surface, girls lounging on floats soaking up the sun, one raising a disposable film camera (Disposable Camera) to flash the lens. [00:06-00:07] Shot 5: Ice in Glass (Macro / Still) Macro still frame, ice cubes drop into a plastic cup, orange liquid splashing up, the hand gripping it adorned with colorful rubber bracelets, sunlight piercing the liquid to cast caustic light spots. [00:07-00:08.5] Shot 6: Dance Tracking (Tracking / Backward Follow) Backward tracking locked on her face, a girl with wet hair clinging to her cheeks and butterfly clips in her hair sways in a woven bikini amid the crowd, hoop earrings swinging, smiling straight into the lens. [00:08.5-00:10] Shot 7: Diving Silhouette (Worm's Eye / Push-in) Worm's-eye upward push, girl launches off the diving board into a silhouette, sun exploding into lens flare, water droplets turning to sparkles in the air. [00:10-00:11.5] Shot 8: Clinking Glasses (Close-up / Left Pan) Quick left pan, two girls clink red plastic cups, liquid spilling out in golden arcs, eyes squinting with laughter. [00:11.5-00:13] Shot 9: DJ Over-the-Shoulder (OTS / Pull-in) Over-the-shoulder push-in on the DJ, foreground fingers hit buttons on the silver CD player, background girls go wild splashing water to the beat, backlit sprays forming a golden rain curtain. [00:13-00:15] Shot 10: Golden Hour Wide Freeze (Extreme Wide / Crane Rise) Crane shot rapidly pulls up, the entire pool party unfurling in golden hour warm light, packed with people and inflatable toys, water surface shattered into gold. Overlay DV timestamp "08/15/2000 PM 5:47," freeze-frame flickering to mimic VHS pause.

prompts.display_text: SHOT: camera_motion: tracking shot movement_dynamics: The camera stays anchored on the central silhouetted swordsman, executing fast micro-pans and sudden whip-pans to frame each incoming enemy from the darkness. The camera shakes violently on each high-impact flash to emphasize the kinetic energy and aggressive strobing rhythm of the scene. ACTIONS: core_action: A heavily silhouetted man in a deep red cinematic void stands in a martial arts combat stance holding a katana. A sequence of massive, monstrous silhouetted enemies rushes him sequentially from the shadows: a hulking bipedal reptile, a giant mutated arachnid, a shadowy wraith with elongated claws, a towering armored brute wielding a heavy mace, and a ferocious winged gargoyle. The swordsman executes blazing, precise katana strikes with authentic momentum conservation. Exactly upon blade contact with each target, a powerful 1-frame white light flash explodes, momentarily overexposing the entire scene and freezing the exact point of impact. Between the strobing flashes, the environment instantly plunges back into deep red darkness, while the defeated monsters immediately dissolve into black smoke or drop out of frame. The sequence maintains a relentless, high-contrast, hyper-kinetic rhythm of shadows, precise physical strikes, and sudden blinding light.

Scene 4 (12-15s): extreme slow-motion single cherry blossom petal tumbling and rotating in front of Big Ben, fades to black, text "London in bloom" appears in elegant serif font. Mood: poetic, romantic, cinematic. Color grade: warm golden tones with soft pink accents. Audio: gentle piano, distant bell chime, string swell.

The model wears a haute couture silk-textured evening gown, her hair strands gently swaying in the wind, with a blurred neon city elevated bridge in the background. 5-8 seconds: [360-Degree Orbiting Track Shot] The model stands at the central intersection of three sports cars, with the camera orbiting rapidly around her from a low angle. prompts.display_text: Want to know how to achieve this insane level of cinematic detail and fluid dynamics using Seedance 2.0? Here is the exact prompt I used! Subject: > A large, shaggy-haired dog and a real white duck, both completely free of leashes or harnesses. Both animals are soaking wet, with water visibly dripping from the dog's heavy coat and beading off the duck's waxy feathers. Action: > The dog and duck enter the house together. In the center of the room, they both stop for a synchronized grooming moment. In extreme slow motion, the dog starts a powerful head-to-tail shake, creating a massive, spiraling spray of water droplets. Simultaneously, the duck stands tall, stretches its neck, and vigorously flaps its wings to shake off the rain, sending smaller, fine droplets into the air. The two overlapping sprays of water create a beautiful, chaotic pattern of liquid physics as they catch the light. Camera & Movement: > Fixed low-angle cinematic shot. The camera is placed at floor level to emphasize the scale of the animals and the trajectory of the water droplets. High-speed camera aesthetic (slow motion) to capture every ripple in the dog's skin and every individual feather movement of the duck. Environment: > Entrance of a cozy, modern home with a polished dark wood floor. In the background, through the open door, a soft-focus view of a grey, rainy garden. The floor acts as a dark mirror, showing sharp, glistening reflections of the dog, the duck, and the flying water. Style & Lighting: > Hyper-realistic documentary style. Natural, soft light from the overcast exterior creates a "cool" rim light on the animals' silhouettes, while warm interior lamps provide a soft "fill" light. High-fidelity liquid simulation for the droplets, with realistic motion blur only on the fastest moving water particles. Technical Metadata: > 15s duration, synchronized dual-subject motion, advanced liquid particles, 4K resolution.

prompts.display_text: EL TAQUERORON SEEDANCE 2.0 — TEXT TO VIDEO — 15 SECONDS — 21:9 ASPECT SHOT 00:00–00:02 · LA TAQUERÍA Extreme close-up macro — the trompo al pastor turning in the early morning light. The meat glistening, the charcoal glow behind it, the pineapple on top catching the fire light. Camera pulls back slowly: Chuy's taquería in Tepito, 6am. Chuy behind the counter — white apron, red bandana on forehead, arms crossed. The trompo turning. The comal hot. The cilantro and onion chopped and waiting. A line of workers, construction helmets and lunchboxes, waiting for their tacos. The trompo spins. Faster than it should. SHOT 00:02–00:04.5 · LA SEÑAL The last customer in line receives his taco. Chuy looks at the trompo — now empty of customers but still turning. He touches the trompo's base with one hand. It vibrates. The pineapple on top begins glowing — not orange from the fire, but supernatural gold. The charcoal fire intensifies: the coals glowing white-hot. The cilantro and onion on the cutting board lift off and orbit the trompo slowly. The salsa jars rattle. The hot sauce begins glowing red. SHOT 00:04.5–00:08 · LA TRANSFORMACIÓN Speed 40%. The trompo IS the transformation's axis — everything builds around its rotation. The vertical spit becomes the robot's spine. The stacked meat panels unfold outward from the spit like a flower — each layer of al pastor becoming one armor plate, the seasoning visible in the texture of each panel, the achiote red and the pineapple gold. The charcoal grill base spreads outward, becoming the robot's legs — the grill grates forming foot soles that leave scorch marks on the street. The comal rises and becomes a shield in the robot's right arm. The enormous carving knife that Chuy uses to slice the taco meat — it rises and becomes the robot's sword, still glowing from the fire. The pineapple on top of the trompo becomes the robot's head — glowing gold, with charcoal-fire eyes. Chuy in the head pod: visible inside the pineapple, red bandana still on, white apron. The hot sauce bottles orbit the robot's shoulders. Sparks fly in achiote red and charcoal orange. SHOT 00:08–00:11 · EL TAQUERO ROBOT The Chuy Robot stands on the Tepito street — built from fire and meat and the smell

prompts.display_text: The scene lives in breath, silence, and proximity. Set the entire moment in a dim vintage apartment hallway, or the corner of an old room that feels half-forgotten. Deep walnut wood paneling. Antique brass wall sconces. One warm amber pool of light falls over the women while everything beyond it dies into shadow. The space should feel beautiful, expensive, and airless, as if the room itself is closing around them. Character one is Han Seo-rin, early 30s, a Korean female idol with an elegant but quietly dangerous presence. She wears a black turtleneck under a long black coat, all clean lines and dark restraint. Her hair is sleek, dark, and softly layered around the face, with a slight fringe that lets her eyes appear and disappear in the low light. She is not loud. She is the kind of woman who controls a room by lowering her voice. Character two is Tachibana Rei, 25, a Japanese female idol with a pale, fragile beauty that reads delicate at first glance but emotionally intelligent on closer look. She wears an ivory V-neck knit dress that falls to the knees, soft and understated, the fabric catching the warm light. Her long dark hair is slightly disordered, as though the evening has already worn her down. She looks like someone trying very hard not to show fear. The emotional shape is simple: suspicion, pressure, fixation. No overt violence. No grabbing. No melodrama. The tension comes from how little space Seo-rin leaves Rei to breathe. Open on Rei already standing near the wall beneath the sconce, shoulders tight, breathing shallow, gaze lowered but restless. Then let Seo-rin enter behind her, close enough to dominate the frame without touching. She stops just at Rei’s back, almost still, letting the silence do the work. The camera should feel like it is slowly being pulled toward them. Seo-rin leans in toward Rei’s ear, speaking so softly that it feels more dangerous than a shout. One hand rises near Rei’s cheek, almost brushing it, but never quite landing. Keep that hesitation. That is where the charge is. Rei’s hands tense near her chest. Her fingers curl. Her jaw tightens. She looks away, then toward the doorway, then down again, realizing there is nowhere easy to go. Use close shots of the details that matter: the tremor in Rei’s fingers, the flicker in her eyes, the shadow of Seo-rin’s face falling across her neck, the black silhouette of the coat swallowing the warm light, the tiny pause before a breath, the way Rei tries to stay composed and fails by a fraction. Dialogue should feel intimate, dangerous, and controlled. Seo-rin, near Rei’s ear, almost gentle: “You can run from everyone else. Not from me.” Seo-rin, after the smallest pause: “Stay where I can see you.” Rei, voice unsteady, trying to hold herself together: “Please... just let me leave.” Seo-rin, with the faintest smile, certain of the answer before she speaks: “You already know this is where the story ends.” Performance note: Seo-rin is never frantic, never theatrical, never raising her voice. Her control is what makes her frightening. Rei is not weak, just cornered; she should feel intelligent, proud, and increasingly shaken, fighting to keep her dignity in a moment that is slipping out of her hands. Visual tone: premium psychological thriller, shallow depth of field, slow deliberate camera drift, warm practical light against surrounding darkness, realistic skin texture, subtle fabric movement, no camp, no exaggerated acting. The scene should feel like a forbidden, dangerous beat from an expensive late-night TV drama.

Then let Seo-rin enter behind her, close enough to dominate the frame without touching. She stops just at Rei’s back, almost still, letting the silence do the work. The camera should feel like it is slowly being pulled toward them.

Seo-rin leans in toward Rei’s ear, speaking so softly that it feels more dangerous than a shout. One hand rises near Rei’s cheek, almost brushing it, but never quite landing. Keep that hesitation. That is where the charge is. Rei’s hands tense near her chest. Her fingers curl. Her jaw tightens. She looks away, then toward the doorway, then down again, realizing there is nowhere easy to go.

Use close shots of the details that matter: the tremor in Rei’s fingers, the flicker in her eyes, the shadow of Seo-rin’s face falling across her neck, the black silhouette of the coat swallowing the warm light, the tiny pause before a breath, the way Rei tries to stay composed and fails by a fraction.

Dialogue should feel intimate, dangerous, and controlled.

Seo-rin, near Rei’s ear, almost gentle:
“You can run from everyone else. Not from me.”

Seo-rin, after the smallest pause:
“Stay where I can see you.”

Rei, voice unsteady, trying to hold herself together:
“Please… just let me leave.”

Seo-rin, with the faintest smile, certain of the answer before she speaks:
“You already know this is where the story ends.”

Performance note: Seo-rin is never frantic, never theatrical, never raising her voice. Her control is what makes her frightening. Rei is not weak, just cornered; she should feel intelligent, proud, and increasingly shaken, fighting to keep her dignity in a moment that is slipping out of her hands.

The scene should feel like a forbidden, dangerous beat from an expensive late-night TV drama.

Orange cat monk jolts awake to loud birds. He freezes... then performs an exaggerated full-body stretch that briefly distorts his silhouette before snapping back. 2 (2–4s) PRAYER HALL ENTRY He rushes straight into black-robed chanting monks. DAY STRUCTURE: 15s / 148 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D slapstick wuxia-animal comedy

TONE: disciplined temple routine collapsing into chaotic micro-mayhem
SUBJECT: Orange cat monk in worn grey dao robe, agile but constantly sleep-deprived
CAST: Black-robed chanting cat monks (low-energy), White training monks (overconfident), Elder red-robed master cat (silent authority)
PROPS: Rope bucket well, wooden bucket, prayer beads, bamboo axe, stone courtyard, rooftop tiles, incense smoke
ENVIRONMENT: Mountain temple complex—courtyard → prayer hall → well → training square → rooftops → bamboo forest → dorm room
COLOR: Dawn gold → harsh noon white → sunset amber
CAMERA: Single uninterrupted 24mm Steadicam, fast whip transitions, gravity-defying follow, no cuts

1 (0–2s) DAWN WAKE
Camera glides through temple roof gap into dorm. Orange cat monk jolts awake to loud birds. He freezes… then performs an exaggerated full-body stretch that briefly distorts his silhouette before snapping back.

2 (2–4s) PRAYER HALL ENTRY
He rushes straight into black-robed chanting monks. They recite in dull unison. He tries to chant—mouth moving too slow—head dips mid-syllable, almost asleep while standing.

3 (4–5.5s) WELL SNAP ACTION
Hard whip pan to courtyard well. He yanks rope instantly—bucket rockets up, water splashes camera. He wipes face aggressively, fully rebooted.

4 (5.5–7.5s) TRAINING SQUARE MISFIRE
Camera swings into white-robed training monks. They strike in formation. He joins late, misreads rhythm, and accidentally redirects every punch—monks scatter outward in synchronized slow-motion confusion.

5 (7.5–8.5s) ELDER INTERRUPTION
Elder red-robed master appears frame edge. Instant freeze. Orange monk bows too fast, overshoots balance, slides sideways in panic respect.

6 (8.5–10s) ROOFTOP LAUNCH
He bolts upward. Camera tilts and follows as he runs wall-to-roof seamlessly, robe flaring. Tiles crack under rapid steps.

7 (10–11.5s) BAMBOO FOREST AXE BURST
Whip transition lands him in forest. He grabs axe mid-motion and chops wood at insane speed—each swing splitting logs and launching chips like ricocheting projectiles.

8 (11.5–13s) SUNSET FATIGUE RUN
Lighting shifts to amber. Same continuous camera tracks him looping tasks—run, chop, stumble recover. Motion stays fast but posture collapses slightly each step.

9 (13–14.5s) RETURN PASS
He walks back through temple gate. Other monks salute. He tries to respond properly but only manages delayed, tired nods while still moving.

10 (14.5–15s) BED DROP END
Camera follows into dorm. He collapses instantly onto mat. Eyes close mid-fall. Final frame holds on stillness as wind chime rings once.

SFX: playful shakuhachi + brisk percussion engine, comedic taiko “bonk” hits on monk impacts, rope snap + water splash burst at well, fast wooden clack for training chaos, bamboo crack percussion in forest, ending with soft koto + single wind chime decay into silence.

prompts.display_text: Cinematic action-comedy with classical martial arts flair, stylized animal kingdom rural village, surrounded by reflective rice paddies, soft morning mist, warm sunlight diffused through clouds, dynamic camera, highly choreographed physical action, grounded yet fluid movement, practical stunt-inspired choreography, subtle humor. S1 (0.9s) Wide shot: A chubby orange cat wearing a bamboo hat and gray Taoist robe walks calmly along a narrow path between rice fields, water reflecting the sky and distant wooden houses. S2 (0.8s) Tracking shot: Groups of raccoon-like villagers in 17th-century European peasant clothing pause their work, turning to stare at the cat with puzzled expressions. S3 (0.9s) Close-up: Two raccoon villagers lean in, whispering to each other suspiciously, eyes darting toward the orange cat. S4 (0.7s) Upward tilt: On a second-floor wooden balcony, an elderly black bear lady wearing a white wig and simple peasant dress hangs laundry. S5 (0.8s) Accident: She bumps into a flower pot—time slows—the pot tips over the edge. S6 (0.7s) Falling shot: The flower pot drops rapidly toward a small white rabbit in ragged beggar clothes standing below, unaware. S7 (0.8s) Reaction: The bear lady gasps and shouts in panic, reaching out helplessly. S8 (1.0s) Action trigger: The orange cat’s eyes sharpen—instant movement—he pivots and sprints. S9 (1.0s) Parkour sequence: He steps onto a wooden cart, kicks off a wall, then rebounds between vertical surfaces in a fluid, multi-step aerial path. S10 (1.0s) Mid-air precision: Body twisting, robe flowing, he extends one arm and catches the falling flower pot mid-air, perfectly timed. S11 (0.9s) Descent: Using momentum, he flips and lands lightly on the ground, maintaining balance effortlessly. S12 (0.8s) Gentle beat: With his free hand, he casually pats the little white rabbit’s head, reassuring and calm. S13 (1.0s) Reaction shot: The black bear lady clutches her chest in relief, then smiles gratefully. S14 (1.0s) Crowd response: The raccoon villagers break into delighted applause, earlier suspicion replaced with admiration. S15 (1.2s) Final shot: The orange cat adjusts his bamboo hat slightly, standing composed as ripples move through the rice paddies, a subtle confident aura as he looks forward. Motion & Effects: Highly detailed physical choreography, grounded multi-step parkour, precise timing, cloth simulation on robe, environmental interaction (walls, cart, ground), soft motion blur, cinematic camera flow (tracking, tilt, orbit), light comedic tone blended with elegant martial arts action.

S4 (0.7s) Close-up: The basket sways gently, vibrant eggs contrasting against the dark, muted environment. S5 (0.8s) Sudden tension: A horse carriage bursts into frame, driven recklessly by a hyena dressed as a gray-clad servant, charging toward the cat lady. S6 (0.7s) Impact moment: The carriage nearly hits her—she recoils—basket tilts— S7 (0.8s) Slow-motion: Dozens of Easter eggs fly into the air, spinning, scattering across the snowy street. S14 (1.0s) Emotional beat: The rabbit blushes slightly under his ragged hat, still trying to balance the eggs. S15 (1.2s) Final shot: Snow falls gently as the crowd claps, the orange cat lady nods gracefully in gratitude, warm light reflecting on the rabbit’s face as he stands awkwardly yet proudly. prompts.display_text: Cinematic hyper-dynamic fast-paced multi-shot sequence, epic mythological battlefield, IMAX film simulation, 35mm Panavision lens, f/4, heavy cinematic color grading, dramatic contrast between dark necrotic tones and radiant golden divine light. Shot 1: Extreme close-up on Sun Wukong’s face, covered in dirt and blood, golden eyes flickering with exhaustion yet defiance. His fur is matted, his breathing heavy. He kneels in the center of a ruined battlefield, his golden staff cracked and planted into the ground for support. Around him, countless skeletal warriors slowly close in, their hollow eyes glowing with eerie green fire. Shot 2: Rapid shaky handheld shot circling Wukong. The skeletal army tightens its formation, bones clattering, rusted weapons scraping. Wukong struggles to stand, gripping his staff, as the undead swarm prepares to strike from all directions. Shot 3: Low-angle shot from behind Wukong. Just as the skeletons lunge forward, a faint golden glow begins to emerge behind him, cutting through the darkness like dawn breaking through a storm. Shot 4: Sudden explosive bloom of radiant golden light. A towering Buddha manifestation appears behind Wukong, विशाल and serene, radiating infinite divine energy. The battlefield is instantly bathed in warm, overwhelming golden luminosity. Shot 5: Fast upward tilt. Rows upon rows of celestial soldiers materialize in the sky and on the ground behind the Buddha—heavenly generals clad in ornate golden armor, divine banners flowing, weapons shining with sacred light. Shot 6: Whip-pan across the battlefield. The skeletons freeze mid-attack, their bodies trembling under the pressure of the divine aura. Golden light surges outward like a tidal wave. Shot 7: Ultra-fast sequence of disintegration shots. The skeletal army is instantly reduced to ash—bones crack, dissolve, and scatter into glowing dust, evaporating into nothingness under the overwhelming holy radiance. Shot 8: Wide epic drone pull-back. Wukong stands silhouetted in front of the colossal golden Buddha and the vast heavenly army. The battlefield, once dark and corrupted, is now purified, glowing with divine light. Golden particles drift through the air like sacred snow. Final frame: Freeze in epic tension—Wukong gripping his staff, head slightly bowed, while behind him the Buddha and celestial army radiate infinite power, dominating the horizon.

prompts.display_text: The camera rockets up from beneath a burning battlefield trench, tearing past shattered stone pillars, broken siege engines, and falling embers, then whips into a downward tilt to reveal a vast war-torn valley below in full violent eruption—armies colliding, fire lines spreading, and massive explosions ripping through the ground. At the edge of a разрушed fortress cliff stands a warrior woman in dark, battle-scarred armor, utterly fearless, gazing into the chaos below as if commanding the war itself. The shot continues in one fluid move: the camera arcs past her shoulder, ash and sparks streaking across frame, then spirals downward around the cliff in a tightening circle, revealing scale—burning catapults, collapsing towers, soldiers scattering like ants, and distant shadowy war beasts moving through smoke and fire. The spiral tightens, speed increasing, wind roaring harder, battlefield sound swelling—metal clashes, distant screams, thunder rolling across a blood-red sky. Then the camera rises slightly into a final close, frontal reveal of her face—wind-whipped, streaked with ash and sweat, completely calm, eyes locked forward, burning with cold determination as firelight flickers across her expression.

prompts.display_text: The masked ronin dashes across the drifting platforms, pursued by a colossal winged beast whose chest is a swirling vortex of storm clouds and lightning. The camera hurtles from island to island, struggling to keep up as rocks tilt, spin, and crumble away beneath them. Every wingbeat sends shockwaves through the air, shaking the frame and blowing debris and rain straight into the viewer's face. Rapid handheld cuts capture the ronin leaping impossible gaps, sword carving arcs of light that briefly cut through the darkness. The finale shows the camera diving behind him as he jumps off the last crumbling rock, riding a bolt of lightning directly into the monster's chest vortex with a final, all-or-nothing slash that explodes the storm from within and clears the sky in a blinding flash.

Character Reference: 1 as the exact character reference. Face, body, posture, clothing must remain identical. No stylization drift. Environment A dark living room at night. Only light source: a TV screen flickering. Minimal furniture. Quiet atmosphere. Hook (0–3s) The TV glitches. For a split second, something is off. Then the room flickers into a completely different reality. 13-Second One-Take Sequence 0–2s The living room suddenly transforms into a horror scene, walls decayed, dim red lighting, distant whispering. The character doesn’t react. SFX: glitch + low horror ambience 2–3s Instant flicker → now sci-fi spaceship interior. Cold blue lights. Mechanical hum. 3–5s The Netflix red glow slowly spreads from the TV across the room. Light bleeds into every surface. Music: deep cinematic build begins 5–7s The world cycles rapidly around the character: • medieval throne room • crime interrogation room • post-apocalyptic wasteland All while the character stands perfectly still in center frame. 7–9s The character slowly raises a remote. Presses pause. SFX: hard digital click 9–11s Everything freezes mid-action: • a sword mid-swing • dust particles suspended • a character mid-fall Absolute silence. 11–12s The main character looks around calmly. Steps through the frozen scene. 12–13s They sit back into their original couch position. The room snaps back to normal. On TV: “Continue Watching?” Soft Netflix red glow fades. Audio Direction SFX: glitch distortions, environment swaps, digital pause click Music: slow cinematic build → cuts to silence at pause → subtle ambient ending Important Notes Keep transitions fast but readable All environments must feel real, not stylized CGI Character must remain calm → contrast is key

Seedance 2.0 Prompt: Style 100% real-life filmed texture, iPhone documentary look, handheld single take feeling, natural low-light environment, slight breathing shake, subtle focus hunting, soft sensor noise in shadows.
Character Reference: Use Image1 as the exact character reference. Face, body, posture, clothing must remain identical. No stylization drift.
Environment A dark living room at night. Only light source: a TV screen flickering. Minimal furniture. Quiet atmosphere.
Hook (0–3s) The TV glitches.
For a split second, something is off.
Then the room flickers into a completely different reality.
13-Second One-Take Sequence
0–2s The living room suddenly transforms into a horror scene, walls decayed, dim red lighting, distant whispering.
The character doesn’t react.
SFX: glitch + low horror ambience
2–3s Instant flicker → now sci-fi spaceship interior.
Cold blue lights. Mechanical hum.
3–5s The Netflix red glow slowly spreads from the TV across the room.
Light bleeds into every surface.
Music: deep cinematic build begins
5–7s The world cycles rapidly around the character:
• medieval throne room • crime interrogation room • post-apocalyptic wasteland
All while the character stands perfectly still in center frame.
7–9s The character slowly raises a remote.
Presses pause.
SFX: hard digital click
9–11s Everything freezes mid-action:
• a sword mid-swing • dust particles suspended • a character mid-fall
Absolute silence.
11–12s The main character looks around calmly.
Steps through the frozen scene.
12–13s They sit back into their original couch position.
The room snaps back to normal.
On TV: “Continue Watching?”
Soft Netflix red glow fades.
Audio Direction
SFX: glitch distortions, environment swaps, digital pause click
Music: slow cinematic build → cuts to silence at pause → subtle ambient ending
Important Notes
Keep transitions fast but readable
All environments must feel real, not stylized CGI
Character must remain calm → contrast is key
prompts.text: Style 100% real-life filmed texture, iPhone documentary look, handheld single take feeling, natural low-light environment, slight breathing shake, subtle focus hunting, soft sensor noise in shadows. Character Reference: Use Image1 as the exact character reference. Face, body, posture, clothing must remain identical. No stylization drift. Environment A dark living room at night. Only light source: a TV screen flickering. Minimal furniture. Quiet atmosphere. Hook (0–3s) The TV glitches. For a split second, something is off. Then the room flickers into a completely different reality. 13-Second One-Take Sequence 0–2s The living room suddenly transforms into a horror scene, walls decayed, dim red lighting, distant whispering. The character doesn’t react. SFX: glitch + low horror ambience 2–3s Instant flicker → now sci-fi spaceship interior. Cold blue lights. Mechanical hum. 3–5s The Netflix red glow slowly spreads from the TV across the room. Light bleeds into every surface. Music: deep cinematic build begins 5–7s The world cycles rapidly around the character: • medieval throne room • crime interrogation room • post-apocalyptic wasteland All while the character stands perfectly still in center frame. 7–9s The character slowly raises a remote. Presses pause. SFX: hard digital click 9–11s Everything freezes mid-action: • a sword mid-swing • dust particles suspended • a character mid-fall Absolute silence. 11–12s The main character looks around calmly. Steps through the frozen scene. 12–13s They sit back into their original couch position. The room snaps back to normal. On TV: “Continue Watching?” Soft Netflix red glow fades. Audio Direction SFX: glitch distortions, environment swaps, digital pause click Music: slow cinematic build → cuts to silence at pause → subtle ambient ending Important Notes Keep transitions fast but readable All environments must feel real, not stylized CGI Character must remain calm → contrast is key

prompts.display_text: Cinematic dark fairy-tale thriller with comedic twist, eerie enchanted forest, low-key lighting, cold moonlight filtering through dense trees, volumetric fog, high contrast shadows, dynamic handheld camera, expressive character animation, fast-paced storytelling. S1 (0.9s) Wide shot: An orange cat older brother in blue overalls and a gray flat cap runs barefoot through a dark forest, pulling along a white cat little sister in a dirty pink dress, both breathing heavily. S2 (0.8s) Rear tracking shot: The forest behind them echoes with distant howling wolves, shadows shifting between trees. S3 (0.9s) Forward reveal: Through the fog, a glowing candy house made of sweets appears at the end of the path, colorful and surreal against the dark woods. S4 (0.7s) Close-up: The siblings slow down, eyes wide—fear mixed with curiosity. S5 (0.8s) Door action: The orange cat cautiously pushes open the candy door, it creaks softly. S6 (0.9s) Interior wide: Inside, dim warm light reveals a strange room—giant half-open birdcage, scattered sweets, and a bed in the corner. S7 (0.8s) Close-up: On the bed lies a white-haired “grandma” in green pajamas and a white shower cap, blanket half covering her face. S8 (0.9s) Dialogue moment: The “grandma” weakly gestures toward the birdcage, implying there is cake nearby, voice soft and inviting. S9 (0.8s) Insert shot: A cake sits temptingly near the open birdcage door. S10 (1.0s) Action split: The little sister eagerly reaches for the cake, while the orange cat narrows his eyes, scanning the room. S11 (0.9s) Suspicion reveal: Close-up at the foot of the bed—a wolf tail sticks out from beneath the blanket. S12 (1.0s) Action burst: The orange cat instantly grabs a nearby large iron shovel, swings it with full force toward the “grandma’s” head. S13 (1.0s) Impact & reveal: The shower cap flies off—“grandma” leaps up in pain, revealing a ferocious wolf face, snarling before panicking. S14 (1.0s) Escape: The wolf stumbles and scrambles out the door, fleeing into the dark forest. S15 (1.2s) Final comedic beat: The orange cat scratches the back of his head proudly, while the little sister happily eats cake beside him, cheering with crumbs on her face. Motion & Effects: Dynamic chase camera, shaky handheld for tension, fast snap zooms during action, exaggerated character expressions, cloth and fur simulation, soft glow from candy elements, contrast between horror atmosphere and playful comedic timing.

prompts.display_text: Cinematic shot, HYPER-REALISTIC 8K rendering. The scene is governed by a single, unwavering rule: the SUN and SKY are photorealistic and real; EVERY OTHER ELEMENT, without exception, is a completely and consistently rendered, FULLY VOLUMETRIC, three-dimensional stained-glass art installation. The soundtrack contains NO MUSIC, only the rich, resonant, and diegetic sound effects of the environment and the characters' actions. The setting is a city street at dusk. The real sun has just set, but the sky is still filled with a deep orange and purple light. The street is made of volumetric glass cobblestones, and is flanked by towering, sculptural 3D stained-glass buildings. A Day Chaser, a bike messenger, is weaving through traffic at high speed. They are a living being, their body showing the focused, athletic posture of an experienced urban cyclist. They lean hard into a turn, their glass eyes scanning ahead for obstacles. Their bike is a functional, 3D sculpture of leaded glass and brass-toned glass fittings. As they ride, they are actively chasing the last usable light of the day, moving from the deep shadows of the buildings into the open intersections where the bright light of the real sky is still reflected on the wet glass streets. When they pass through these patches of reflected light, their body projects a fleeting, beautiful, and kinetic smear of caustics onto the 3D glass pavement. Key Visual Directives for Realism: Day Chaser Materiality (THE CORRECT LOOK): A masterpiece of stained-glass art, composed of multiple, individually crafted, stained-glass pieces, meticulously leaded together. They possess believable human features (hair, eyes, mouth) in intricate glasswork, with a sophisticated palette. Consistent 3D World: The buildings, the street, the bike, and other sculptural glass vehicles are all rendered as fully volumetric, 3D objects. Light Dynamics: The light is ambient and reflected from the sky, creating a moody, high-contrast urban scene. No mystical glowing or artificial CGI sparkles. Implied Sound (Diegetic Only): The whirring sound of the glass bike's chain and gears. The hiss of the glass tires on the wet glass cobblestones. The distant, echoing, resonant sounds of a stained-glass city at nightfall. Artistic Tone: Gritty, energetic, and cool. A scene about a living being's focused and skillful work, rigorously adhering to the core visual laws.

prompts.display_text: High-quality anime style, 2D animation. Warm, cinematic lighting with sunlight filtering through blinds. A tiny man wearing a green hoodie and blue jeans runs across a wooden floor toward a giantess. He climbs up her massive foot and leg, which are covered in black fishnet stockings, using the fishnet holes to climb. Dynamic low-angle camera following his ascent, emphasizing the colossal scale of the giantess. He climbs past her black pleated skirt and white collared shirt, scaling up her dark blue ribbed sweater. The camera pans up to reveal the giantess looking down at him. She has long brown hair, a flower hair clip, and large brown eyes. She wears a highly surprised, wide-eyed expression with a slight blush. Background is a softly blurred bedroom with a music keyboard.

prompts.display_text: POV downhill longboard run, viral energy, max chaos. SUBJECTS: First-person downhill longboard rider, front foot, deck nose, and flickering trucks appearing low in frame during drops, slides, and stair gaps. Flower pots, café chairs, scooters, cats, delivery bikes, tourists, and laundry erupt around the rider as sudden obstacles. ENVIRONMENT: Dense Mediterranean cliffside town, whitewashed stair alleys, blue shutters, tiled landings, sea-glow at the horizon, hanging laundry, tangled wires, sun-faded murals, narrow terraces, umbrellas, puddles, warm late afternoon light, deep stone shadows, layered rooftops dropping toward the coast below. MOOD: Adrenaline, max chaos, nonstop downhill street speed. COLOR LOGIC: Hyperreal Pop Look with sun-bleached whites, cobalt accents, coral signage, golden flare. CAMERA DETAILS: 360 action-cam POV, horizon-stable but brutal, nonstop forward drive, minimal roll, heavy stair vibration, sharp side and rear parallax, full-sphere chaos, no release. 0:00–0:03: POV freefalls into a steep stone stairwell, board nose rattling low in frame as the rider lands into brutal vibrating descent. A café server yanks a tray away from the line while walls, balconies, plants, and faces whip past inches away. SFX: sea wind, wheel chatter, stair hits, breath, distant crowd. 0:03–0:05: POV slashes left across a tiny tiled landing, clips past stacked flower pots, then snaps into another stair drop as hanging laundry lashes across the front hemisphere and tourists recoil. SFX: cloth slap, ceramic clink, wheel scrape, crowd gasp. 0:05–0:08: POV hammers the next staircase as a cat darts center frame and pigeons burst upward from a side ledge. The rider speed-check slides, then threads between a parked scooter and iron handrail with almost no clearance. SFX: tire chirp, wings flapping, metal rattle, stair thuds. 0:08–0:10: POV blasts over a short cobblestone gap between stair sections, trucks clacking, then drops straight into the next descending run as delivery bikes streak through the side wrap. SFX: wheel buzz, curb thump, distant horn, crowd echo. 0:10–0:13: POV attacks two tight landings and another steep stepped lane, every hit jolting the sphere as rooftops, awnings, church bells, alley mouths, and flashes of sea curl around the viewer. SFX: air rush, heavy thump, stair chatter, wind buffeting. 0:13–0:15: POV rips to a cliff overlook and throws into a savage stand-up slide, dust and tiny pebbles spraying across the lower frame while the glowing sea-town skyline blooms around the full sphere. SFX: wheel screech, gravel spray, crowd roar. Hyperreal, continuous-shot chaos, no text, no logos.

CAMERA DETAILS: 360 action-cam POV, horizon-stable but brutal, nonstop forward drive, minimal roll, heavy stair vibration, sharp side and rear parallax, full-sphere chaos, no release. 0:00–0:03: POV freefalls into a steep stone stairwell, board nose rattling low in frame as the rider lands into brutal vibrating descent. A café server yanks a tray away from the line while walls, balconies, plants, and faces whip past inches away. SFX: sea wind, wheel chatter, stair hits, breath, distant crowd. 0:03–0:05: POV slashes left across a tiny tiled landing, clips past stacked flower pots, then snaps into another stair drop as hanging laundry lashes across the front hemisphere and tourists recoil. SFX: cloth slap, ceramic clink, wheel scrape, crowd gasp. 0:05–0:08: POV hammers the next staircase as a cat darts center frame and pigeons burst upward from a side ledge. The rider speed-check slides, then threads between a parked scooter and iron handrail with almost no clearance. SFX: tire chirp, wings flapping, metal rattle, stair thuds. 0:08–0:10: POV blasts over a short cobblestone gap between stair sections, trucks clacking, then drops straight into the next descending run as delivery bikes streak through the side wrap. SFX: wheel buzz, curb thump, distant horn, crowd echo. 0:10–0:13: POV attacks two tight landings and another steep stepped lane, every hit jolting the sphere as rooftops, awnings, church bells, alley mouths, and flashes of sea curl around the viewer. SFX: air rush, heavy thump, stair chatter, wind buffeting. 0:13–0:15: POV rips to a cliff overlook and throws into a savage stand-up slide, dust and tiny pebbles spraying across the lower frame while the glowing sea-town skyline blooms around the full sphere. SFX: wheel screech, gravel spray, crowd roar. Hyperreal, continuous-shot chaos, no text, no logos.

prompts.display_text: Cinematic fantasy dark-comedy action, medieval European castle bedroom, warm candlelight vs cold moonlight contrast, dramatic shadows, ultra-dynamic camera, exaggerated character animation, high-detail textures, fast-paced editing, humorous tone. S1 (0.9s) Wide shot: A chubby orange cat in full medieval European knight armor stands beside a luxurious canopy bed inside a castle bedroom, moonlight spilling through wooden windows. S2 (0.8s) Close-up: On the bed, a white cat princess sleeps messily, loudly snoring, one paw casually picking her nose in an unrefined, comedic manner. S3 (0.9s) Medium shot: The orange cat shakes her urgently, armor clanking, trying to wake her up, visibly frustrated. S4 (0.7s) Close-up: The princess continues snoring, completely unfazed, bubble forming from her nose. S5 (0.8s) Cut to window: Outside the wooden window, a pair of giant glowing eyes suddenly appears in the darkness. S6 (0.9s) Reveal shot: A pink fire-breathing dragon presses its face near the window, exhaling faint smoke, eyes wide and menacing. S7 (0.8s) Reaction shot: The orange cat freezes, then instantly turns serious, gripping his longsword. S8 (1.0s) Action burst: With a powerful kick, the orange cat smashes through the wooden window, splinters flying outward. S9 (1.0s) Balcony wide shot: The cat lands on the stone balcony, facing the hovering pink dragon under moonlight. S10 (1.0s) Combat: The cat lunges forward, slashing rapidly with the longsword, sparks and motion blur streaks. S11 (0.8s) Twist: The dragon suddenly opens its mouth and bites down, swallowing the sword whole. S12 (0.9s) Close-up: The orange cat pauses, then instantly switches expression, huge sparkling eyes, puffed cheeks, exaggerated ultra-cute innocent face. S13 (1.0s) Reaction: The dragon’s fierce expression melts into confusion and softness, flames dying down. S14 (1.0s) Punchline action: In a split-second, the orange cat snaps back to normal and kicks the dragon hard, sending it tumbling off the balcony into a deep abyss. S15 (1.2s) Final close-up: The orange cat turns to camera, smirks proudly, and gives a playful left-eye wink, armor gleaming in moonlight. Motion & Effects: Fast-paced comedic timing, strong motion blur, dynamic camera swings (orbit, low-angle, snap zooms), particle effects (wood splinters, smoke, sparks), expressive character animation, seamless flow, high-impact yet humorous finish.

prompts.display_text: Alien ships drop into frame from above, flying low between skyscrapers and staying directly ahead. Their cannons charge and fire, explosions erupt in sequence along the road. The camera tilts sharply upward mid-flight, bringing the ships into full view overhead. It then banks hard into a side angle, racing alongside them as they blast the street below. The camera whips into a backward tracking motion, ships pushing forward toward the lens, firing relentlessly, shockwaves chasing the camera. A final snap into a tight follow shot behind a ship locks the motion as it continues firing into the city. Continuous motion, no cuts, ships always visible, high tension.
