prompts.display_text: Static close-up shot. A realistic human hand interacts with a flat 2D animated character of Furina — a blue and white dress anime girl with long light blue hair — inside a clear glass cup placed on a wooden table. [0-2s] The hand pinches Furina by the head and lowers her into the glass; she grabs the rim with both arms and resists, refusing to go in, while the fingers keep pressing her down. [2-4s] She loses grip and slides down the glass wall, desperately kicking and clawing at the wall trying to climb back up, but keeps slipping back to the bottom, with a surprised yelp. [4-7s] She gives up and slumps at the bottom, eyes shut, two exaggerated wide noodle-tears streaming down her cheeks, crying dramatically. [7-9s] She suddenly leaps up, shaking both fists at her sides furiously, tears still on her face, yelling angrily upward in protest — expression both crying and fuming, super cute. [9-11s] The finger reaches in and gently pats her head; she immediately stops, sits still obediently, hands clasped on her chest, looking up at the finger with big teary puppy eyes. [11-13s] The fingers pinch her head again and lift her straight up out of the glass; halfway up she tilts her head slightly, eyes half-lidded, a small smug tsundere smile on her lips. [13-15s] Fully lifted out and suspended in the air, her eyes open wide and she breaks into a big bright energetic grin, hands spread open happily, frame holds steady. AR mixed-media style: flat 2D cartoon character with full physical interaction with a real 3D glass — sliding and climbing along the glass wall, realistic glass refractions, cast shadows, and wall contact all rendered naturally. Soft warm natural lighting, super cute and heartwarming mood.

prompts.display_text: A small white mushroom-eared creature is hurled forward from outstretched hands. It tumbles toward the camera, its white body swelling until it fills the entire frame — white flash. Chase camera locks behind the mushroom-eared creature as it rockets forward and slams into a wall of red crystalline armor. On impact it explodes — cyan crystal shards and square pixel-particles burst radially. The creature splits into several identical copies that scatter in every direction. The camera pulls straight up, revealing a circular red arena from overhead. The copies ricochet off surfaces in erratic bouncing arcs, each landing triggering a magenta or blue starburst flash. A white variant joins mid-sequence, trailing blue beam lines. The bouncing grows chaotic with overlapping hit effects. One mushroom-eared creature arcs directly past the lens, its body blocking the frame — wipe to black. A character stands behind a large golden wheel covered in ornate engravings. Both hands grip the wheel's rim and push — the wheel spins. The character grins while watching it turn. The camera starts tight on the character's hands and the spinning wheel, then slowly widens. Red carnival lamps ring the stage. Gold sparkles drift upward. Small white and black mushroom-eared creatures sit in the foreground as an audience, arms raised. The spinning golden wheel glows brighter frame by frame, bleaching to searing white. All figures become silhouettes against the expanding light. The camera pushes IN toward the light source — total whiteout. White flash erupts. A warm-colored blast wave expands outward from center screen. Smaller mushroom-eared creatures launch outward from the center in every direction. The character strikes a double peace sign as multicolored confetti rains from above.

prompts.display_text: Style: Mockumentary (Vlog Style), hyper-realism, fixed camera real-shot feel, natural light, suspense comedy vibe, mobile phone vertical screen shooting texture Duration: 15 seconds Scene: Ordinary family living room, in front of white walls, afternoon sidelight streaming in from the window, yoga mat on the floor, clear human shadows projected on the wall Characters: Female lead @image1 , wearing a sports tank top and yoga pants, ponytail, recording a dance video against a phone tripod [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Everyday Setup (Normalcy / Fixed Camera) Frame: Fixed camera medium shot, phone selfie perspective. Action: Female lead makes a heart gesture to the camera, then starts dancing a simple popular TikTok routine, movements a bit clumsy, occasionally glancing at the phone on the floor for cues. Key Details: At this point, the shadow on the wall is completely normal, perfectly in sync with her movements. Background is quiet, only the music from the Bluetooth speaker playing. Atmosphere: Utterly everyday, no hints of anything unusual. [00:05-00:11] Shot 2: BUG Emerges (The Glitch / Same Fixed Camera) Action: Female lead repeats the same dance segment, and midway through a turn— High-Energy Moment (Core Punch): The shadow on the wall suddenly **doesn't follow the turn**, instead switching on its own to a completely different set of high-difficulty street dance moves (Breaking Power Move), the shadow executing a flawless Thomas full spin on the wall, smooth and fluid. Female lead hasn't noticed yet, keeps dancing her simple steps, but the shadow has fully broken sync, going wild with a solo on the wall. Director's Note: The shadow's dance skills should clearly outclass the body. The bigger the contrast in their moves, the stronger the comedy—body doing the "I Love You" hand gesture dance, shadow pulling off windmill floor moves. [00:11-00:15] Shot 3: Comedy Reversal (The Punchline / Same Fixed Camera) Action: Female lead finishes dancing and looks back at the phone replay, spots the shadow's anomaly, whips her head around to glare at the wall. Character: A petite anime girl with long silver-white hair styled in twin low sections, soft layered strands flowing weightlessly, with subtle iridescent color streaks (cyan, magenta, yellow accents). Large teal-green eyes, calm and emotionless with a faint hint of softness. Wearing a black futuristic tactical jacket covered in multicolor glitch-like paint patterns (RGB splashes), high collar partially covering her mouth, multiple belts, pouches, and mechanical details. Equipped with sleek high-tech headphones with glowing accents. Slim build, delicate but precise movements. Weapon: A minimalist black katana with subtle reflective edge, clean and elegant design. Scene: Interior of a white, ethereal zero-gravity space. The environment is minimalistic and surreal, with soft glowing light, broken gravity, floating fragments of panels and geometric debris drifting slowly. The space feels silent, vast, and dreamlike. 0–3s — tension Camera drifts slowly in zero gravity. The girl floats in mid-air, hair and jacket drifting softly. She holds the katana loosely, body relaxed but ready. Tiny debris particles pass by in slow motion. 3–6s — ignition Enemy figures (abstract humanoid silhouettes, minimal detail) push off floating surfaces and rush toward her from multiple directions. She slightly tilts her head, eyes tracking movement precisely. 6–10s — chaos choreography Combat begins in full 360° zero-gravity space. She spins gracefully mid-air, body rotating fluidly while executing precise katana strikes. Each slash is clean and controlled, leaving faint neon trails (cool blue/purple). Camera follows her in a smooth tumbling motion, synchronized with her rotation, maintaining cinematic clarity. 10–13s — escalation She lightly touches a floating fragment with her foot, then forcefully launches herself forward. High-speed dash across multiple enemies in a straight, elegant line. Time slightly compresses, emphasizing speed and precision. 13–15s — final frame Motion slows down. Enemy bodies drift apart silently in zero gravity. She stabilizes her posture, floating upright. Hair and jacket settle gently. She lowers the katana slightly. Final frame holds on her calm expression in the white void. Freeze.

prompts.display_text: *“Anime cooking scene, Makoto Shinkai cinematic style, side-angle camera. Flour-dusted wooden table, sunlight streaming through window, all ingredients arranged in bowls: tomato sauce, cherry tomatoes, salami, mushrooms, peppers, shredded mozzarella, parmesan, fresh basil, olive oil bottle, dried oregano, red pepper flakes. Hands pick up dough ball, begin stretching it sideways — dough pulls and stretches thin, flour dust lifts into sunlight in slow motion. Hands place stretched dough flat on floured surface, grab wooden rolling pin — roll firmly forward and back, dough spreads wide, edges curl slightly. Hands lift dough round, lay it flat. Spoon scoops tomato sauce from red bowl, pours onto center of dough — back of spoon spreads it in slow confident spiral outward, sauce glistens. Hands drizzle olive oil bottle in thin stream over sauce — golden drops catch sunlight. Right hand grabs shredded mozzarella by the handful, scatters generously — cheese lands softly across surface. Hands layer toppings one by one: salami slices placed in overlapping circle, mushroom slices dropped casually, colorful pepper pieces scattered, cherry tomatoes halved and pressed gently into cheese. Fingers pinch dried oregano from jar, crumble over pizza — fine herb dust floats in light rays. Pinch of red pepper flakes scattered. Fresh basil leaves torn by hand, placed last. Hands slide pizza onto wooden peel. Camera pulls back — full pizza visible, golden afternoon light, flour particles glowing, volumetric light rays through window. prompts.text: *“Anime cooking scene, Makoto Shinkai cinematic style, side-angle camera. Flour-dusted wooden table, sunlight streaming through window, all ingredients arranged in bowls: tomato sauce, cherry tomatoes, salami, mushrooms, peppers, shredded mozzarella, parmesan, fresh basil, olive oil bottle, dried oregano, red pepper flakes. Hands pick up dough ball, begin stretching it sideways — dough pulls and stretches thin, flour dust lifts into sunlight in slow motion. Hands place stretched dough flat on floured surface, grab wooden rolling pin — roll firmly forward and back, dough spreads wide, edges curl slightly. Hands lift dough round, lay it flat. Spoon scoops tomato sauce from red bowl, pours onto center of dough — back of spoon spreads it in slow confident spiral outward, sauce glistens. Hands drizzle olive oil bottle in thin stream over sauce — golden drops catch sunlight. Right hand grabs shredded mozzarella by the handful, scatters generously — cheese lands softly across surface. Hands layer toppings one by one: salami slices placed in overlapping circle, mushroom slices dropped casually, colorful pepper pieces scattered, cherry tomatoes halved and pressed gently into cheese. Fingers pinch dried oregano from jar, crumble over pizza — fine herb dust floats in light rays. Pinch of red pepper flakes scattered. Fresh basil leaves torn by hand, placed last. Hands slide pizza onto wooden peel. Camera pulls back — full pizza visible, golden afternoon light, flour particles glowing, volumetric light rays through window. prompts.display_text: The camera rockets up from below, tearing past jagged cliff walls, then whips into a downward tilt to reveal the ocean below in full violent eruption, waves detonating against black rock. On the cliff edge stands a warrior woman, utterly fearless, gazing into the maelstrom as if daring it to rise higher. She steps forward without hesitation and leaps off the edge, arms spread wide, plummeting through howling wind and salt spray. The camera dives alongside her in freefall, her hair and cloak thrashing upward as the black rocks and churning sea rush closer. Then a massive shadow tears through the mist below — a dragon surges upward with wings unfurling like storm sails, scales gleaming wet with ocean spray. It swoops beneath her mid-fall, and she lands on its back with practiced grace, fingers gripping the ridges along its neck. The dragon banks hard, climbing in a spiraling arc back up past the cliff face. The camera keeps pace, circling tight, then pulls ahead into a final close, frontal reveal: she rides the beast skyward, wind-whipped, calm, and burning with determination, the raging ocean now small and powerless far below.
prompts.author: @1littlecoder
